| | Fellow American, I hope you are reading the emails I send, but quite frankly, we're not seeing many of our supporters take action. While Republicans kept a U.S. House seat in our hands on Tuesday in Tennessee, the margin dropped by over HALF from one year ago when President Trump easily won the same district over Kamala Harris. It's got me wondering if there is a correlation between the lull in contributions we're seeing, and the low margins are candidates are winning by this year. Is the writing on the wall, and I'm the only one who doesn't see it? Are you still motivated to win, or have you lost faith in spite of our many accomplishments this past year? I'm curious to know what's going on. Next year's election is going to be a turnout election, and I can assure you that the Left is going to show up. I'm really worried about our folks, voters like you, getting out to vote when President Trump isn't on the ballot. **I 'm asking a small favor:** could you please let me know if you're still with us by making a small contribution of at least $10 today? I know this isn't a poll exactly, but my team and I will use the results of this email to determine the size and the strength of our movement as it stands today. name: James Carville
subject: Republicans could win in New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
If we lose New Hampshire, we lose any shot at flipping the Senate. Period.
Folks, it’s James Carville.
If I had any hair, I’d be ripping it out right now!!
Democrats’ chances of winning the New Hampshire Senate race have _officially been downgraded.**That means Republicans are in spitting distance of flipping this seat and cutting off ANY chance Democrats have of retaking control of the Senate next year._**
**[Before you read another word, chip in $5 to help Chris Pappas hold the line in New Hampshire.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251220_1.BKbArY&refcode=em20251220-1&t=1&akid=4088%2E582294%2EqTKXV4)**
**[Rush $5 to Chris Pappas Right Now!](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251220_1.dDghFB&amount=5&refcode=em20251220-1&t=2&akid=4088%2E582294%2EqTKXV4)**
Let me be crystal clear. If Democrats blow it in New Hampshire, we have NO path to taking back the Senate. Not a snowball’s chance in hell.
Any guess who the GOP recruited into the race? John Sununu. Yes, that same Sununu family. John’s got the famous last name, he’s got Wall Street’s money, and he’s got the full force of the national Republican establishment behind him.
Chris Pappas is the only thing standing in their way. Chris isn’t some lightweight. He’s won one of the toughest Congressional districts in the country four times running. He knows how to fight and win.
**_But — with Sununu in the race — if we don’t rally around Chris Pappas right now, we’re going to get steamrolled!_**
So here’s what I need from you: **[Chip in $5, or more if you can, to help Chris Pappas fight back and hold this seat for the Democrats.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251220_1.BKbArY&refcode=em20251220-1&t=3&akid=4088%2E582294%2EqTKXV4)**
**[Rush $5 to Chris Pappas Right Now!](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251220_1.dDghFB&amount=5&refcode=em20251220-1&t=4&akid=4088%2E582294%2EqTKXV4)**
_This is the GOP’s dream scenario:_ an open seat in a swing state, a big-name Republican, and a whole lot of dark money to burn. I know from my years of campaigning that this is exactly what they were hoping for.
**It’s time to get off our butts and fight like hell for Chris.** Let’s show these Republican bigshots that they can’t just waltz in and buy New Hampshire. Not on our watch.
**[Give what you can right now.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251220_1.BKbArY&refcode=em20251220-1&t=5&akid=4088%2E582294%2EqTKXV4)** Let’s win this damn thing and flip the Senate.
— James Carville
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251220_1.BKbArY&refcode=em20251220-1&t=6&akid=4088%2E582294%2EqTKXV4)
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251220-1&t=7&refcode2=4088_582294_qTKXV4&akid=4088%2E582294%2EqTKXV4)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=8&akid=4088%2E582294%2EqTKXV4)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=9&akid=4088%2E582294%2EqTKXV4)

Chris Pappas is the only thing standing in their way. Chris isn’t some lightweight. He’s won one of the toughest Congressional districts in the country four times running. He knows how to fight and win. But — with Sununu in the race — if we don’t rally around Chris Pappas right now, we’re going to get steamrolled! So here’s what I need from you: This is the GOP’s dream scenario: an open seat in a swing state, a big-name Republican, and a whole lot of dark money to burn. I know from my years of campaigning that this is exactly what they were hoping for. It’s time to get off our butts and fight like hell for Chris. Let’s show these Republican bigshots that they can’t just waltz in and buy New Hampshire. Not on our watch. Let’s win this damn thing and flip the Senate. — James Carville New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?

---

_**"Import the third world, become the third world."**_ Peter,

**That's the Radical Left's dangerous game plan — and it's in full effect RIGHT NOW to steal the 2026 midterms.**

This is Rep. Andy Ogles.

**I’VE BEEN LOUD AND CLEAR.**

Dems are flooding America with MILLIONS of illegals from jihadist hotspots, cartel strongholds, and dangerous communist regimes.

**The result? **

**-** SKYROCKETING CRIME

**-** ENDLESS WELFARE DRAIN ON YOUR DIME

**-** OVERCROWDED SCHOOLS

**-** STRAINED HOSPITALS

**-** AND NEIGHBORHOODS THAT ARE TOO UNSAFE FOR YOU AND YOUR FAMILY

**These aren't migrants seeking opportunity. **

**They’re tools being used by the left to IMPORT dependent voters, tip the scales, and seize permanent power. **

**Peter, our culture and American way of life is getting buried in front of our eyes in real time.**

---
| [ **STOP THE INVASION NOW >>** ](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/a0LTNtQPFLMP9fpOrDgsBmsXU1vR97W93yp-jnN7QgOoGb9-w5ouVNt6cUnl-YFL9LBVCvIoTFuMprXKwvjaSltOu697bhqG0WDWEry3UvmDszKFK0T76KHa06FkPzbMDI1xedMbnEqJ-SqzXyDo5xmfdDxsLu9Br0_jvsjTpQVzVgIbPfSKv_CXLgKKWxqrTeEjRuKjAgNtB0JeTuT8vNqo6DOa3Qvo7NfSW-gXYDhLSpCPmE8iHg7YMRYLWGrT-pGJXHwT00Z1Q9erjCkhhL6xTsDRLmtFf-4tekIBSt4Za9VkwjpiXckSJXXBHnHqtS7N5JRzfvb2LOjH-psJvXKM4EKzd7MqXeAUD4jOEFU49WeW3R1WS4ypuizm_VQ3xYZOxzLSUNxfDwNSdrdktUmmFUTH0o6BZM3sTRvns_8mMqyaQTYzpLYLMhDZHayP7xUBtmqZSZCDbwGNx14Z5kU7vf7zEEn3m_vEjvBLqXcN3eEfZfdCwFGV2zQSkMy0ot_h6PUhV2SgUa197n5d1oQJEJDvoAjyMPixAGQwE_os1tGCDxJR8c_mdXRUp7h0oK6aDBzRsCaea2vJySj8ffHHx99aNrDfPNhjK3bbch0rD4gtkVglz3sb5YR_MVwWQUTFwBAxeMlYojtg9P05cO7P3xSN5SbgkzLuEzf5RP8Fl38apJjCyITuNpennD_YnraTi9sXdQnBOlK21IuLvdWO-xGCOX7bJSP-DdtqAjPd2UHVB44Pp-FvedEjIYhc1ESKctr-KKxE0SSu14k5DU3pENDJ60DvyMsvbHWdUJK70uw9P9Jq5TvqZtKPc6AwSPkC6JbDy94URHCpidqo/-XDdDU_Mphsw47Oxq0dZ_Zi7ttqhDSVM/16)
---
**AOC, Ilhan Omar, Hakeem Jeffries, and the Radical Left elite are counting on this invasion to remake America into a failed socialist state.**

That’s why the 2026 midterm elections are DO-OR-DIE.

**If we lose just ONE seat, our razor-thin MAGA majority crumbles:**

Trump impeached AGAIN...

Borders erased completely...

Crime waves are unstoppable...

subject: I need to tell you something …
body:
I'm going to be straight with you. This is the hardest time of year for independent journalism. Media companies are laying off staff by the thousands.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e10085674/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvZVRRTURxMjg2Sg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMjA/LbmNsZXpCU3lkSw/qP2hpZHM9bmNNbHJTR013SWxLcGdscw/gaUaxFA/s7pe887d300)

| | | | | [****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) [****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Dear Patriot,

I'm going to be straight with you.

This is the hardest time of year for independent journalism. Media companies are laying off staff by the thousands. Supporters have pulled back. The establishment press is circling the wagons.

And the corrupt? **They're counting on us to go dark.**

Last week, one of my undercover journalists sat across from a government official who didn't know he was being recorded. What came out of that official's mouth would make your blood boil. It's the kind of footage that changes policy. The kind that forces resignations. The kind they pray never sees the light of day.

**But here's the problem:** I can't release it until my team verifies every detail. I can't put another journalist in the field until I know I can protect them. And I can't launch the three investigations we have lined up for January [**without the resources to see them through**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.).

That's why I'm reaching out to you tonight. [**Will you help?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

A patriot who believes in what we do has stepped forward with a **$100,000 matching challenge**. Every dollar you contribute before midnight on New Year's Eve will be **[**doubled instantly**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**.

That means:
* Your $35 becomes $70 — enough to purchase a covert recording device.
* Your $100 becomes $200 — enough to fund a secure communication setup.
* Your $500 becomes $1,000 — enough to deploy a journalist for a three-day undercover operation.
* Your $5,000 becomes $10,000 — enough to launch an entire investigation from start to finish.

If we hit our $100,000 goal, we unlock **$200,000** to start 2026. With that, I can guarantee you this: **→** Three new undercover teams deployed by January 15th **→** At least 10 corrupt officials exposed in the first quarter alone **→** Legal protection for every whistleblower who trusts us with their story **→** Hidden camera footage they don't want you to see — released to millions [**You and I both know what's at stake**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.). The people in power don't fear the mainstream media anymore. They own them. What they fear is what we do: showing up where they don't expect us, recording what they say when they think no one's listening, and releasing the truth they can't spin away.

This work isn't comfortable. It isn't glamorous. My journalists take real risks. _They do it because they believe — like you and I believe — that the truth still matters._

So here's what I'm asking: **[**Will you stand with us by donating today?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**

Whatever you can give — $35, $100, $500, or more — will be matched dollar for dollar. Your gift is tax-deductible. And every cent goes directly into putting journalists in the field and cameras in front of the corrupt.

The match expires at **[**midnight on New Year's Eve**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**. After that, the opportunity is gone.

You've been with me through raids, through firings, through lawsuits designed to shut us down. Every time they counted us out, you proved them wrong. Don't let them win this one.

I'll see you on the other side of this.

In Truth, James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

**P.S.** I almost forgot — every donor who gives before midnight will receive exclusive early access to our first major investigation of 2026. You'll see it before anyone else. This is my thank-you for having my back when it counted most. **[**Give now and your gift will be doubled instantly.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**

---
[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e10085674/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMjA/LbmNsZXpCU3lkSw/qP2hpZHM9bmNNbHJTR013SWxLcGdscw/gaUaxFA/s7oe747c577)

name: Joseph Geevarghese via Our Revolution
subject: URGENT: We're at risk of pulling back for 2026 – can you help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34883?t=1011&refcode=email-20251220_v&akid=9993%2E5885482%2EjLtPT4 ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

I wish I had better news. But today, I need to level with you: right now,
Our Revolution’s grassroots fundraising is falling off a cliff.

We are $37,253 short of where we must be by December 31. If we can’t close
this gap, we’ll be forced to scale back some of our biggest plans for 2026
– just when our movement is needed most.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34883?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20251220nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9993%2E5885482%2EjLtPT4 ]So, I have to ask: will you chip in right now to help us keep the heat on
Trump and his oligarchs, reclaim the House and Senate by electing
progressives, and get more people into the streets in massive numbers in
2026?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34883?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20251220nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9993%2E5885482%2EjLtPT4 ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34883?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20251220nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9993%2E5885482%2EjLtPT4 ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34883?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20251220nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9993%2E5885482%2EjLtPT4 ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34883?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20251220nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9993%2E5885482%2EjLtPT4 ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34883?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20251220nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9993%2E5885482%2EjLtPT4 ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34883?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20251220nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9993%2E5885482%2EjLtPT4 ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

For years, Our Revolution has never backed down from the tough fights.
We’ve elected 1,000+ progressives up and down the ballot. We’ve taken on
dark money and pushed the Democratic Party to commit to taking
superdelegates off the first ballot and to reject corporate and dark money
in the 2028 presidential primary.

Now, Trump’s approval is collapsing. This could be the moment we turn the
political tide – but unless we rally together, this could also be the
moment our movement is forced to scale back at the worst possible time.

We have ambitious plans for 2026. We’re ready to fuel massive GOTV efforts
to take back power. We’re ready to turn our movement out into the streets
in record breaking numbers for No Kings and other events. The playbook?
Grassroots organizing. House by house. Block by block.

But that takes organizing muscle. If we miss this fundraising goal, we’ll
have to cut organizers in key states and scale back our GOTV plans in this
crucial Midterm election year.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34883?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20251220nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9993%2E5885482%2EjLtPT4 ]Can you make a powerful donation today—$15, $35, or whatever you can
spare—to defend and grow Our Revolution into 2026?

You’ve seen Our Revolution go toe-to-toe with billionaires – and win. We
don’t have CEOs bankrolling us. We have you.

And we cannot cede the field to corporate PACs and Trump loyalists, just
when they’re weakest.

This movement is people-powered. Every single donor – every $5, every $10
– makes a real, concrete difference. We’ve done the math. $37,253 is what
stands between a fully-powered Our Revolution, or a pared-back approach in
2026. Can you be the difference?

Joseph Geevarghese
Executive Director, Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Sorry to interrupt your Saturday morning…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I just had a check-in with my team.
Hi Peter — I’m sorry to email so early, my team and I are having frequent check-ins on the progress to our December fundraising goal.
Believe me, I wish I didn’t have to ask for your support so often, but we will not succeed without your help.
Republicans are already investing heavily against me, and we expect them to spend _hundreds of millions_ more in the months to come — this could potentially become the first U.S. Senate race ever to cost a billion dollars. They’re lining up PACs, dark-money groups, and mega-donors to write endless checks to benefit my opponent. _Talk about absurd._
We need to be able to take them on — dollar for dollar. That’s why missing this month’s fundraising goal could set us back significantly, but I know that our team will step up before time runs out.
**[I’m personally asking for your support right now. Please split a contribution between our campaign and Heartland Patriots that fits in your budget.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98660?refcode=em20251220-9849&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9849%2E614464%2E0792uD)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Roy Cooper and Heartland Patriots will process instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98661?refcode=em20251220-9849&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=9849%2E614464%2E0792uD) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98661?refcode=em20251220-9849&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=9849%2E614464%2E0792uD) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98661?refcode=em20251220-9849&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=9849%2E614464%2E0792uD) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98661?refcode=em20251220-9849&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=9849%2E614464%2E0792uD) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98661?refcode=em20251220-9849&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=9849%2E614464%2E0792uD) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98661?refcode=em20251220-9849&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=9849%2E614464%2E0792uD) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98660?refcode=em20251220-9849&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=9849%2E614464%2E0792uD)
---
I deeply appreciate all your help,
Roy Cooper

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23748%2E4449941%2E9ulMZW) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23748%2E4449941%2E9ulMZW) **Donald Trump is SO mad!!**

[Our hero – Senator Amy Klobuchar – just introduced an](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71090?t=3&akid=23748%2E4449941%2E9ulMZW) [AMAZING bill that would automatically register all eligible U.S. Citizens to vote!!! ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71090?t=4&akid=23748%2E4449941%2E9ulMZW) [ **Sign our MASSIVE petition now to demand Congress pass the _Register America to Vote Act_ and SAVE our right to vote >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71090?t=5&akid=23748%2E4449941%2E9ulMZW)
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71090?t=6&akid=23748%2E4449941%2E9ulMZW)
| [SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71090?t=7&akid=23748%2E4449941%2E9ulMZW)
---
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71090?t=8&akid=23748%2E4449941%2E9ulMZW)
**We still need [11,294] more signatures from your area to hit our goal.**

Listen, the _Register America to Vote Act_ is a monumental step towards protecting Voting Rights in America!

**It’s on ALL of us to make sure every voter can reach the ballot box without barriers.** [**Passing this legislation is the first step.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71090?t=9&akid=23748%2E4449941%2E9ulMZW)

This bill would give ALL Americans an equal opportunity to use their voice in our democracy...but Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans are already doing everything they can to SHUT IT DOWN!!

[**_They know that higher voter turnout means that they would never win another election again._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71090?t=10&akid=23748%2E4449941%2E9ulMZW)

We cannot let Senator Klobuchar's bill fall through the cracks. **So we’re launching an URGENT 24-hour petition to gather MASSIVE support!**
[ **Sign our MASSIVE petition now to demand Congress pass the _Register America to Vote Act_ and SAVE our right to vote >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71090?t=11&akid=23748%2E4449941%2E9ulMZW)

We need you to do the right thing in this critical moment, team. **[1,239] more signatures is all we need.**

_Please, scroll back up and add your name._

Counting on you,

Fight For Reform

Did you see this email about our phenomenal candidate Cyndi Munson for Oklahoma Governor?

Although she is remarkably qualified, Cyndi is still waiting on some of the biggest endorsements she will need to win this race – and that depends on how the next couple of weeks go.

Here’s the thing: Many large organizations and donors wait to see if a candidate has early traction before they jump in to support them. Hi Peter,

As we near the end of 2025, national studies continue to rank Oklahoma as one of the worst states (perhaps THE worst state) for women.

Oklahoma has the highest rates of domestic violence and one of the worst maternal death rates nationwide. Not to mention, the state enforces one of the strictest abortion bans in the country, with no exceptions for rape or incest. And now, in the aftermath of Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill,” **_most_ of Oklahoma's rural hospitals are at risk of closing.** As you can imagine, this has horrifying real-world consequences.

Despite all of that, the Republican frontrunner for Governor of Oklahoma – Charles McCall, the GOP Speaker of the Oklahoma House of Representatives – is doubling down on culture wars rather than responding to the needs of constituents in this deep red state. He recently released a disturbing commercial in which he slices a banana in half (???) while stating, “Gender is god-given, and there’s only two of ‘em.”

That’s not all: McCall’s campaign website brags about his record of passing the **_strongest anti-choice law in the nation_** , supporting legislation that attacks vaccines, holding an A rating from the NRA, banning sanctuary cities, erasing Critical Race Theory from schools, and much more.

**Cyndi is nearing a make-or-break end-of-year fundraising goal for two reasons: 1.) The fundraising numbers her campaign posts by January will be essential to helping her secure more endorsements and early support. 2.) **Unsurprisingly, Oklahoma is among the states with the lowest women’s representation in its state government. As outlined above, this underrepresentation is reflected in the state’s dangerous and draconian policies for women.**

As Governor, Cyndi will repeal Oklahoma’s abortion ban. As she’s been meeting with voters across her state, she’s found that voters on both sides of the aisle feel that the current anti-abortion laws do not meet their values and ultimately prevent too many women from getting the care they need.

Additionally, according to the 2024 March of Dimes report, 51.9% of Oklahomans do not have access to maternity healthcare, and an additional 18.2% have low/moderate access to healthcare. As Governor, Cyndi wants to increase access to maternity healthcare for women across the state and fully eliminate these healthcare deserts. Her plan is to introduce legislation that would increase funding for hospitals and assist in the recruitment of doctors who specialize in women’s healthcare.

**Here’s the thing:** Cyndi flipped a _majority Republican_ district and has kept it for the last 10 years – she’s actually increased her win margins election after election. She accomplished this by knocking on doors, having honest conversations, and staying true to her values. Now, she needs our help to keep up that momentum.

We’ve seen Democratic Governors win in “red” states – despite having Republican supermajorities in their State Houses and Senate chambers. Kentucky and Kansas, for example, have both elected popular Democratic Governors. **If anyone can do it, it’s Cyndi Munson.**

[**As women across Oklahoma endure harsh conditions inflicted on them by their majority-male government, we can help make an actual difference – and ensure men like Charles McCall do not get to govern women’s bodies. Please rush critical early support to ensure Cyndi is able to post strong fundraising numbers at the end of this month by chipping in a split $20.26 or more contribution between Cyndi’s campaign and Her Bold Move today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121658341/590182359/-300884483?refcode=EM_F_251220bump_N_JZ_90DO_5_NG_N_L3&amount=20.26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlZjFjNTk4LWI0ZGQtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTFlYzhjNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iEr77wdo-J5wDhEepYxwD7kV2xALhUnxNfaw1u8cKH8=)

Colleen Davis
Endorsements Manager
Her Bold Move

This week, the House passed Shontel Brown’s bipartisan SAMOSA Act, or **Strengthening Agency Management and Oversight of Software Assets**. The bill was passed unanimously by the House and now heads to the Senate for a vote.

The federal government spends around $33 billion annually on software, but many agencies have unused or duplicate licenses. Brown’s bill would reduce waste by ensuring agencies only have what they need and use. Shontel stated, “**This is what government efficiency efforts should look like, addressing real problems in a thoughtful way.** ”

[**Shontel is working to get things done for the American people even in the minority – that is the leadership that we need and deserve. Team Shontel Brown
Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?

body:
I wanted you to hear this directly from me | | | Hi, Friend, it’s Sherrod. I wanted to reach out personally and share some incredible news: **A brand-new poll shows me leading my opponent Jon Husted – 49% to 48%.** First, I want to say _thank you_. I got back in the fight to take on a rigged system that benefits the wealthy and well-connected, while working people pay the price. And this early momentum is a strong sign that our people-powered campaign is resonating with Ohioans. But here's the problem: The wealthy donors, the corporate special interests – they’re all panicking after seeing this poll. Last cycle, they spent more than $250 million against me, and they're gearing up to spend millions more to crush our momentum. We can't let that happen, Friend. They know as well as we do that we have what it takes to flip this seat, but it could all come down to resources. That’s why we set a goal to raise $50,000 before midnight to keep up our momentum, and I'm personally asking you to help us reach it. [**Will you chip in $10 or whatever you can, split with Able Dems, to help us fight back against the corporate special interests and win this race?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOzlTtz-Osg_YPdrY6QhRg_ItkwHBtzfcZtOCKbttRWejVBQ1prhIIM2molTvXy48LqiugoEUcI9u6V1cajb0f4di2DGzbMxgv9s1Q7BspSs62_eAePY2XMNZC7o4DDCmbhJpUagJCg51sh6oG0jsffJQALBCpk0MG_BYOLnFaDJhoQpv5SMn88oIPkUGaGgYxfryEyyHAtWGotK_6B2mXcrjSgSONGcCcLdGWdBaRfyktLuQ230ZuHlIvM2DTubZzrf62gzRc1IQ08Na2FEfvZM-A1zCNmnEXhHXk4dPcRwaePhDmW_3A8tzfrNpAO5qyqr3stgu-o-iv1nCfDGcrfpFb-DtsJgj8GJfkXOE0LfrrBGqNMwskVh9VmgukmQJA/4ml/TRaLoP64TKSNematLgXMkw/h0/h001.urhD5em7-YLbfCkPdx_rEWK_VHIDidPzwb_E6KjuH1s)**** I’m so proud to have you on this team, Friend. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: re: Katie Porter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2733%2E4032634%2EtlIa_P)
---
In a minute, I’m going to ask you to [**split a donation to support Katie Porter’s campaign for governor in California and our movement.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3293?t=8&akid=2733%2E4032634%2EtlIa_P) But first, I want to talk about why I’m supporting Katie, and why your support matters. Katie shares the lived experience of millions of Californians she’s running to represent — people who work hard, who want to raise healthy kids in good homes without it costing an arm and a leg, and who understand what it’s like to anxiously review their receipts after visiting the grocery store. **Katie has what it takes to lead her state through this affordability crisis.** But a statewide election in California requires a lot of money, and Katie can’t bankroll her own race with her billions of dollars. And she’s not taking contributions from corporations and lobbyists. [**She’s counting on grassroots supporters to power her campaign and win in California. So can you split a donation of $28 or whatever makes sense for you to support Katie’s campaign and strengthen our movement to make America more affordable for every family?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3293?amount=28&t=9&akid=2733%2E4032634%2EtlIa_P)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3293?t=23&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=2733%2E4032634%2EtlIa_P)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3293?t=25&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=2733%2E4032634%2EtlIa_P)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3293?t=27&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=2733%2E4032634%2EtlIa_P)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3293?t=29&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2733%2E4032634%2EtlIa_P)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3293?t=19&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2733%2E4032634%2EtlIa_P)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3293?t=21&express_lane=true&akid=2733%2E4032634%2EtlIa_P)
---

---
I still remember the day when I met Katie. My consumer law class was early in the morning, meaning a lot of students had their heads down, trying to avoid being called on. But not Katie. She was determined and ready to go. When the first answer she gave wasn’t her strongest, she came to my office hours and said, “Please keep calling on me. I am going to learn to do this.” Getting to know her, I saw her bone-deep commitment to making a difference in people’s lives. When Katie decided to run for Congress in 2018, I was very happy to support her. I knew that we needed more people like her in Washington — who understood the real struggles that working families faced, who had the courage to stand up to big corporations and special interests, and who would fight to make our government work for everyone. A Democrat hadn’t represented her district for decades, but she knew exactly how to personally connect with voters, build a strong movement, and win. She flipped that seat, and she’s been winning for working people ever since. Simply put, Katie delivers. She’s smart and she isn’t afraid. She stands up to Wall Street and Big Pharma, she holds fossil fuel companies accountable, and she fights to protect Californians’ rights against Trump’s far-right administration. She is exactly who Californians need as their next governor. [**So please, if you can, split a donation of $28 or whatever makes sense between Katie’s campaign and our movement. We’re going to keep fighting to make our government work for working people — and we need you in this fight.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3293?amount=28&t=15&akid=2733%2E4032634%2EtlIa_P) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3293?t=13&akid=2733%2E4032634%2EtlIa_P)
---

name: Redistricting Action
subject: An inside look at where our redistricting fights stand
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
We need to make sure we have the resources to keep fighting back
|
---

_Today, we're in the midst of a redistricting crisis — and our democracy needs to be actively defended every day. That's why All On The Line is now**Redistricting Action** — a grassroots movement built for the critical fights ahead. Thank you for being part of it._
Peter,
It can be hard to keep track of the chaos being sown as Donald Trump and the anti-democracy extremists launch attack after attack in their manufactured redistricting crisis.
A big part of our work at Redistricting Action is making sure supporters like you know exactly what’s going on — and what we’re doing about it. Today, we wanted to share a recap of where these fights stand in key states across the country — and ask you to [**make a gift to help meet the urgent needs of this moment in our battle for fair maps.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121659485/590185556/798345718?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_RecapRedistricting_email_20251220-AOTL-Tier1-RecapRedistricing_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251220-AOTL-Tier1-RecapRedistricing_&utm_campaign=RecapRedistricting&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFhZjFjNTk4LWI0ZGQtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTFlYzhjNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W86n0S9n-KVJYfG5TOiXXJgWJjoHCmfNNxigIUiGz2w=)
**Missouri**
The Republican-controlled legislature passed a gerrymander that is now being challenged by voters who have submitted over 300,000 citizen signatures through the state’s referendum process. To stop this effort, Trump allies have begun pouring millions into Missouri.
**Our teams are mobilizing volunteers on the ground to ensure extremists don’t get their way.**
**Indiana**
After months of pressure, attacks, and violent threats from Washington, Indiana Senate Republicans rejected one of the most egregiously gerrymandered maps in the country.
**Redistricting Action spent months educating, training, and mobilizing voters to speak out against the state’s proposed mid-decade gerrymander. Our work paid off, Peter.**
**Florida**
In another direct attack on democracy, some Florida legislators are bending the knee and joining Donald Trump’s push to rig the midterms by further gerrymandering the state’s congressional map mid-decade.
**We are currently training communities on how to contact their representatives and speak out against any attempt to redraw the map before the 2030 Census.**
Peter, we're grateful to everyone in this people-powered movement who makes it possible for us to push back against attacks and ensure every map truly represents the people. But anti-democracy extremists have shown they’ll spare no expense to silence voters in 2026 and beyond.
[**Can you make a donation now to support our efforts to stop gerrymandering wherever fair maps are under attack? Whatever you’re able to give will make a BIG difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121659487/590185558/798345718?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_RecapRedistricting_email_20251220-AOTL-Tier1-RecapRedistricing_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251220-AOTL-Tier1-RecapRedistricing_&utm_campaign=RecapRedistricting&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFhZjFjNTk4LWI0ZGQtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTFlYzhjNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W86n0S9n-KVJYfG5TOiXXJgWJjoHCmfNNxigIUiGz2w=)

clean_body: We need to make sure we have the resources to keep fighting back | Today, we're in the midst of a redistricting crisis — and our democracy needs to be actively defended every day. That's why All On The Line is nowRedistricting Action — a grassroots movement built for the critical fights ahead. Thank you for being part of it. Peter, It can be hard to keep track of the chaos being sown as Donald Trump and the anti-democracy extremists launch attack after attack in their manufactured redistricting crisis. A big part of our work at Redistricting Action is making sure supporters like you know exactly what’s going on — and what we’re doing about it. Today, we wanted to share a recap of where these fights stand in key states across the country — and ask you to = Missouri The Republican-controlled legislature passed a gerrymander that is now being challenged by voters who have submitted over 300,000 citizen signatures through the state’s referendum process. To stop this effort, Trump allies have begun pouring millions into Missouri. Our teams are mobilizing volunteers on the ground to ensure extremists don’t get their way. Indiana After months of pressure, attacks, and violent threats from Washington, Indiana Senate Republicans rejected one of the most egregiously gerrymandered maps in the country. Redistricting Action spent months educating, training, and mobilizing voters to speak out against the state’s proposed mid-decade gerrymander. Our work paid off, Peter. Florida In another direct attack on democracy, some Florida legislators are bending the knee and joining Donald Trump’s push to rig the midterms by further gerrymandering the state’s congressional map mid-decade. We are currently training communities on how to contact their representatives and speak out against any attempt to redraw the map before the 2030 Census. Peter, we're grateful to everyone in this people-powered movement who makes it possible for us to push back against attacks and ensure every map truly represents the people. name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: I used to flip burgers

Peter, it's Raja. Have I ever told you the story about my second-ever job?

My first job was as a newspaper boy, handing out the Peoria Journal Star at the crack of dawn in middle school.

But my second job was working at the McDonald's at the corner of University and War Memorial Drive. Back then, they put all the women on cash registers, and all the men in the back. So I literally flipped burgers to make money ( not for a photo op ).

It wasn't glamorous, and I smelled like French fries well after my shift was over, but that job taught me a lot about integrity and character. In fact, I remember my boss firing someone who tried to use a bun that fell on the ground.

He didn't fire him just because he did something unsanitary; he fired him because, to him, it mattered who his workers were when they thought no one was looking.

That's a lesson I've taken with me in every venture of my life, Peter. It matters who you are when no one is looking, whether you're a fry cook at McDonald's or running for United States Senate.

If you've read this far, thanks for listening to my story. It's an example of the American dream that I want to restore for the millions of us who need something to dream for right now.

Can you chip in a grassroots gift to my campaign? Every dollar helps us flip the Senate and stop Trump's agenda. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_raja_fr_em_q42025?amount=15&amounts=10,15,25,50,100,250]

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. SPACE FORCE!**](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/gdYehE_9prHk/UmtKVVZRL3haTENTVXBXUHFiWUt0T013cVpMUzkvbTNpOUYzVkgvNHNnRTJNcE1tK09jQkhRQUd5allucGs4UEM1S3p5aHVnOUhKODhsdWZpa0VKTGRTaFVrSWhNRDdQeEJHRFRtOGF4UEU9S0/U0JQakQvT3hiVkg1eHQxNFBrY0M0L3VCWW1ETkIwWkVUSUxJZWt5RGMwc0ZMMEVGSG1BbFI5dkRXQzAvcGZoc0w1VkJ1UTJlMjc2Sy9qbmFJODc5VzJRcm4wM0lCbjU0S0)
[](https://links.e.uso.)
Dear USO Supporter,
Six years ago today, the newest branch of our military was established. The Air Force Space Command was reclassified as the U.S Space Force in 2019, tasked with helping secure our nation's interests in space.
The Guardians of the Space Force protect our country and our freedom to operate in space each day. We're grateful for the sacrifices they make to fulfill that duty, and we can't miss this opportunity to tell them thank you. **[We have a goal of getting 60,000 people to sign our birthday card in honor of the Space Force's birthday. Will you add your name now?](https://links.e.uso.)**
Life for the service members stationed at Clear Space Force Station near Anderson, Alaska can be exceptionally challenging. It is cold, dark and isolated, and they work long hours and make sacrifices for our security that most people don't even know about.
[SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/N-6VBp2b6vMa/UmtKVVZRL3haTENTVXBXUHFiWUt0T013cVpMUzkvbTNpOUYzVkgvNHNnRTJNcE1tK09jQkhRQUd5allucGs4UEM1S3p5aHVnOUhKODhsdWZpa0VKTGRTaFVrSWhNRDdQeEJHRFRtOGF4UEU9S0/U0JQakQvT3hiVkg1eHQxNFBrY0M0L3VCWW1ETkIwWkVUSUxJZWt5RGMwc0ZMMEVGSG1BbFI5dkRXQzAvcGZoc0w1VkJ1UTJlMjc2Sy9qbmFJODc5VzJRcm4wM0lCbjU0S0)

Thanks to our military supporters, USO Alaska helps deliver food, hosts sip and paint nights, donates books and video games and more. These brave Guardians we serve are protecting us while being separated from their families -- let's show them we're grateful for all they do for us.
**[Please take some time today to sign the card and wish the Space Force a very happy sixth birthday!](https://links.e.uso.)**
On behalf of our heroes,
Team USO

name: VoteVets
subject: Liars, cheats, and crooks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We’re tired of everybody burying this story. It’s time to get loud about it. Because when these scumbags get rich, Veterans will die. The only way we can stop that is by coming together and forcing them.
#
Peter,
Writing to make sure you saw the news that Trump and VA Secretary Collins are eliminating 35,000 health care jobs — doctors and nurses — at the VA.
That’s after they cut 30,000 jobs already. Whatever staff are left are overworked without any hope of relief. Clinics and hospitals are understaffed. In many cases, it’s doctors and nurses working the phones because all of the administrative staff were cut.
We made a promise to Veterans — you serve us, and we will serve you. We are breaking that promise. And it’s important to be clear about why:
It’s not just because these people are evil. Not just because they’re liars, cheats, and crooks — though that’s a part of it. It’s because they don’t want the VA to exist in its current state.
They haven’t been able to figure out how to get rich off of battered Veterans yet. They want service to get worse, they want people waiting longer for worse care. They want all of that so they can justify selling off the VA to some private health care provider owned by their rich friends — and make millions off the stock trades.
We’re tired of everybody burying this story. It’s time to get loud about it. Because when these scumbags get rich, Veterans will die. The only way we can stop that is by coming together and forcing them.
VoteVets has fought off VA privatization schemes for two decades, but this one is unlike any other. It’s the greatest threat to health care for Veterans in any of our lifetimes, and we’ve got to start fighting back.
**[Please, make a donation to VoteVets so we can do just that. We have to mobilize as soon as possible.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec25.3jrL2s&refcode=em251220-1-160&t=1&akid=34829%2E3013755%2EzEAMqb)

And when I looked at your supporter profile, I saw this: = Before I go any further, I have to ask: = | | = = This is our golden opportunity to prove to every GOP opponent watching our fundraising numbers — and the entire MAGA machine — that Democrats have the momentum to sweep the midterm elections. Grassroots supporters like you are the reason we hit goals like these, and we can’t afford to let this one slip. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = — Kirsten Gillibrand * A message from DSCC Chair Kirsten Gillibrand: =

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: You remind me of why I do this work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Your belief in our shared vision gives me strength when the work gets tough.

As we approach the holiday season, I want to express my gratitude for your support.

This year has been filled with challenges and triumphs, and through it all, your unwavering support has been the foundation of everything we've been able to accomplish together.

Every day in the Senate, I'm reminded of why I do this work. New Hampshire families who are working hard to build better lives need a Senator to fight for them. We need to protect our freedoms, expand opportunities, and ensure that everyone has a fair shot at success. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121661056/590190209/1734447991?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.20_Grateful_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmVlNWVkNS1iNmRkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yVq1sFWfNMjXUYABga_1f1AIPL2qiCqLdppY5JGxDQg=) _Here’s a throwback photo of me and my family!_ None of this would be possible without you. Your belief in our shared vision gives me strength when the work gets tough.

I hope that you'll take pride in knowing that you're part of a movement built on compassion, determination, and the belief that when we work together, we can create meaningful change.

As this year comes to a close, we're looking ahead to the critical work that lies before us. The fights we'll face in the coming year will require the same grassroots strength that has brought us this far.

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: not one damn thing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffries for Congress
body:
Peter, I want to give you the latest.

---
| | Peter, I want to give you the latest. Republicans haven’t done a damn thing to address the healthcare crisis they created. Instead, they’ve slashed and burned coverage for millions of Americans to fund massive tax breaks for their billionaire donors. Now, more than 20 million people are facing skyrocketing healthcare costs because Republicans are determined to turn our country into a piggy bank for the ultra-wealthy. [It’s shameful. It’s destructive. It’s cruel.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121661165/590190421/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20251220_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_v4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmVlNWVkNS1iNmRkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=37EovnlIsIahZ_TBZwFYTbm_ATSM_1yCkpAScvxChP8=) [_Peter, we cannot stand by and let Republicans rip healthcare away from the American people and turn our country into a personal ATM for their billionaire donors. name: Brad Finstad
subject: We warned them. Now the Feds are stepping in.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:
| | | | |
---
| **Friend,** When I sounded the alarm about the fraud, waste, and abuse happening under Gov. Tim Walz and Minnesota Democrats, the Left tried to pretend nothing was wrong.
Well... Now the federal government is stepping in.
Just days ago, the U.S. Department of Labor announced a **“targeted review”** of Minnesota’s benefits system because of “recent discoveries of widespread fraud.” They’re examining everything from Unemployment Insurance to the Federal Child Nutrition Program to autism services and housing support. Federal officials say the state’s “performance and integrity” are in question, and even warned that **Medicaid funding could be withheld** if Minnesota doesn’t clean it up.
This is exactly what I’ve been pressing Walz on. It’s exactly why I introduced the SNAP Data Transparency and Oversight Act. And it’s exactly why Minnesota Democrats are scrambling to announce a brand-new “fraud prevention program” in a desperate attempt to save face.
I’m not backing down. Not when billions of taxpayer dollars have been stolen. Not when hard working Minnesotan taxpayers have been lied to, misled, and taken advantage of.
And now, President Trump is standing with us.
He endorsed our campaign because he knows we’re the ones holding Walz accountable, exposing the fraud, and fighting for transparency. But that also means we’re now a **top target** for Democrats in St. Paul and Washington, D.C. They can’t afford to let the truth get out, and they’re already lining up money to come after us.
I need your help to stay on offense.
**Chip in $10, $25, $50, or more today** to help me continue exposing fraud, protecting taxpayers, and fighting back with President Trump behind us:
---
| | [Donate Now — Stand With Brad](https://Finsta11160a6bc.link.bmesend.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?%3d%3d)
---
| Minnesota deserves the truth. Minnesotans deserve accountability. And with your help, we’re going to deliver it. Thank you for standing with me,

**Brad Finstad**

name: David Hogg
subject: Not every young person should be in power
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Kash Patel is proof.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251220-1&t=1&akid=2965%2E587540%2EPpcNXr)
Peter,
When my dad worked for the FBI, the rules were so strict, and respected by him, that he wouldn’t even stop to grab a gallon of milk on his way home from work in his work car, let alone drop us off at school when it was pouring rain.
Now we’ve got a _podcaster_ running the FBI who’s using agents like his personal Uber.
Seriously — Kash Patel reportedly ordered FBI agents to drive his girlfriend’s drunk friend home from parties. More than once. That’s on top of flying private jets to concerts and assigning his girlfriend a security detail at what the right claims should be the safest place in the world (the NRA convention).
It’s one thing to be young in power. It’s another to be reckless, corrupt, and desperately hungry for it.
Kash Patel is 45. That’s young by D.C. standards. But this should be a reminder: _not every young person deserves to be in power._
If we don’t do the work to elect better young people — leaders who actually give a damn about public service — we’ll keep ending up with people like Patel calling the shots.
**[Can you chip in $5 or anything you can today to help us elect young leaders who deserve to be in power — not power-hungry creeps like Kash Patel?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251220_1_kash_an.PC6vei&refcode=em20251220-2965&amount=5&t=2&akid=2965%2E587540%2EPpcNXr)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251220_1_kash_an.PC6vei&amount=5&refcode=em20251220-2965&t=21&akid=2965%2E587540%2EPpcNXr)**
Thank you,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251220-1&t=22&refcode2=2965_587540_PpcNXr&akid=2965%2E587540%2EPpcNXr)**

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=23&akid=2965%2E587540%2EPpcNXr)

name: Arthur Thompson
subject: How your $7 gift can support more than 10,000 Democrats running for office →
body:
I hope today you’ll give me just a few minutes to explain why this work is so important — and why I think it’s pretty cool.
---
Hi Derek, If you knew that your $7 gift would help more than 10,000 Democrats running for office across the country, wouldn’t that be the most fulfilling gift you could give? My name is Arthur Thompson, and I am the Chief Technology Officer here at the DNC. I hope today you’ll give me just a few minutes to explain the work my team does, why it’s so important, and why I think it’s pretty cool, too. As an enduring entity working year-round in the Democratic ecosystem, our tech team is uniquely positioned to provide data for campaigns, maintain infrastructure, and offer guidance and support centrally to all Democratic state parties, campaigns, and other committees, saving them massive amounts of time and money. We are the only organization positioned to provide data and technologies to Democratic candidates, up and down the ballot and across the country. **And our goal is to make sure candidates running for offices like school board have the same quality tools as those running for Congress, or even the White House.** So when you give to the DNC, you help support candidates from local school boards to Congress, providing them the resources they need to fine-tune their canvassing operations and identify the voters they need to reach to win. [**Work like this requires a massive amount of resources, but makes a huge difference in electing more Democrats nationwide. So if you’re looking to maximize your impact across the country, Derek, will you chip in $7 or whatever feels right to you today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?refcode=em_20251220_5522_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5522_22930333_5KM4B3&akid=5522%2E22930333%2E5KM4B3) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251220_5522_fr&refcode2=5522_22930333_5KM4B3&akid=5522%2E22930333%2E5KM4B3)**

clean_body: I hope today you’ll give me just a few minutes to explain why this work is so important — and why I think it’s pretty cool. Hi Derek, If you knew that your $7 gift would help more than 10,000 Democrats running for office across the country, wouldn’t that be the most fulfilling gift you could give? My name is Arthur Thompson, and I am the Chief Technology Officer here at the DNC. I hope today you’ll give me just a few minutes to explain the work my team does, why it’s so important, and why I think it’s pretty cool, too. As an enduring entity working year-round in the Democratic ecosystem, our tech team is uniquely positioned to provide data for campaigns, maintain infrastructure, and offer guidance and support centrally to all Democratic state parties, campaigns, and other committees, saving them massive amounts of time and money. We are the only organization positioned to provide data and technologies to Democratic candidates, up and down the ballot and across the country. And our goal is to make sure candidates running for offices like school board have the same quality tools as those running for Congress, or even the White House. So when you give to the DNC, you help support candidates from local school boards to Congress, providing them the resources they need to fine-tune their canvassing operations and identify the voters they need to reach to win. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you, Arthur Thompson Chief Technology Officer Democratic National Committee If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support.

name: Wes Moore
subject: Partnership
body:
This is what I have to say.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1094%2E1086043%2ElBq4r_)
Peter, I want to make you a promise.
Together, we’re proving that Maryland is a state that leads -- not follows. And none of our progress would be possible without supporters like you.
**_Here’s my promise: I’ll never take that for granted._**
You’re not an ATM, and we won’t treat you like one. This campaign is built on respect, honesty, and a shared belief that when we move forward, we do it together. That we leave no one behind.
We ask you for donations because this partnership _matters._ Trump is targeting Democratic governors who refuse to back down. Our grassroots strength will determine if we protect all of the gains we’ve made, or cede our progress to Washington.
**[So if you’re able to, will you chip in $5 to keep moving Maryland forward in 2026? Our end-of-year deadline is coming up quick, so your donation will put us in a strong position heading into the new year.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251220-1.6qIMM7&refcode=em-20251220-1&t=2&akid=1094%2E1086043%2ElBq4r_)**

name: Justice Democrats
subject: She took over $236k from AIPAC’s friends in the Israel lobby
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In March, we have the chance to stop AIPAC and its far-right,
billionaire-backed network from buying another seat in Congress.

Junaid Ahmed is our eighth 2026 Democratic primary endorsement and the
working-class progressive running for Illinois’ 8th congressional
district.

His top primary opponent is a former corporate-backed congressmember and
AIPAC ally who previously received over $236,000 from the Israel lobby,
according to Open Secrets:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251220-ja.mRE1Ky&refcode=em20251220-37293&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=37293%2E1203867%2EQK1Jfk ]Open Secrets screenshot showing Rep. Melissa Bean of Illinois received
$236,249 from the Pro-Israel lobby from 1990-2024.

And she’s already raked in more than $58,000 from them this time around:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251220-ja.mRE1Ky&refcode=em20251220-37293&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=37293%2E1203867%2EQK1Jfk ]Track AIPAC: Melissa Bean, candidate for IL-09 U.S. House. $58,183
received from the pro-Israel lobby. Via fec.gov 9/25/25

Junaid isn’t taking money from corporate PACs or AIPAC, and their threats
won’t stop him from standing up against the Israeli government in
Washington.

He’s spent his entire adult life advocating for Palestinian rights and
freedom, and firmly believes in:

* An immediate (actual) ceasefire with full humanitarian aid to
Palestinians in Gaza
* An arms embargo to end all US funding to the Israeli military
* Supporting the self-determination and statehood for the Palestinian
people
* An end to the Israeli Occupation of the West Bank and Gaza

We can bet the Israeli lobby will dump even more into this competitive
primary race to try and stop Junaid, which is why we’re counting on your
support today.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251220-ja.mRE1Ky&refcode=em20251220-37293&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=37293%2E1203867%2EQK1Jfk ]Please split a grassroots donation of any amount to Justice Democrats
and Junaid’s campaign to help us defeat an AIPAC stooge and send a
champion for peace and justice to build our bloc in Congress!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251220-ja.mRE1Ky&refcode=em20251220-37293&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1023&akid=37293%2E1203867%2EQK1Jfk ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20251220-37293-footer&t=1024&refcode2=37293_1203867_QK1Jfk&akid=37293%2E1203867%2EQK1Jfk

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=37293%2E1203867%2EQK1Jfk

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: 5 songs that stood out to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
# [](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1&akid=240548%2E444211%2EdMW4Fp)
Sitting at home in our living room with the record player going... driving from McKinney to Brazos to the rhythm of the radio... putting on my headphones on a late night flight back from Houston... there’s always music.
It might be a record I bought when I was 15... a tune that my friend Mike burned to a mix 10 years ago... something I caught on the radio in San Antonio last year... or a song Molly played me as we were driving to the barn this morning.
But on the off chance it’s interesting to you, here are five songs that stood out to me this year:
**[“Glad and Sorry” - Faces:](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67421?t=3&akid=240548%2E444211%2EdMW4Fp)** This one’s off of their final studio record _Ooh La La_ , whose title track, masterfully sung by Ronnie Wood, you’ve surely heard. But “Glad and Sorry”—this sweet, casual, seemingly effortless gem—shows the quiet strength of the band, especially the songwriting from Ronnie Lane. The rest of the album, and the rest of the Faces’ catalog, is more barroom rock n roll. It’s all good.
**[“Up in Heaven (Not Only Here)” - The Clash:](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67422?t=4&akid=240548%2E444211%2EdMW4Fp)** “Up in Heaven” is a Mick Jones classic, anthemic guitars soaring over his pleading, plaintive vocals about the misery of London’s public housing (“the wives hate their husbands and their husbands don’t care / their children daub slogans to prove they lived there”). Catchy, righteous indignation follows. But it’s just one outstanding track on the triple-album _Sandinista!_ , which itself is a jumble of musical styles, a buzzing spinning laboratory of innovation and experiment. If you don’t like the song you’re listening to, just wait till the next.
**[The Wizard - Black Sabbath:](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67423?t=5&akid=240548%2E444211%2EdMW4Fp)** Off their first album, the one that broke heavy metal into the mainstream. Who knew a harmonica could sound so menacing, so catchy and so metal? I’ve always been a fan, but Ozzy’s death this year brought me back to this album with renewed focus. It amazes me to think of how young they were, how much ground they were breaking, and the legion of music that would follow in their wake.
**[Sleeping - The Band:](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67424?t=6&akid=240548%2E444211%2EdMW4Fp)** Richard Manuel’s mournful voice, Levon Helm’s skipping, waltzy drums, and just the majesty of The Band in their prime. A great Sunday tune, when you’re ready to stay checked out all day. “To a land of wonder when you go under / why would we want to come back at all?”
**[Texas Me - Sir Douglas Quintet:](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67425?t=7&akid=240548%2E444211%2EdMW4Fp)** Singing about the Texas he loves and misses—“It's rainin' in Port Arthur / Snowin' in Fort Worth town / Standin' in front of Farmer’s Pool Hall / In San Antone, in my hometown”—Doug Sahm belts out this beauty which, with the rest of the album, makes the case for the real Texas. Which is not any one thing or place. But all of it. Country, conjunto, garage, psychedelia, rock n roll... all of this beauty from all over coming together in this one wonderful place.
Yes. This is all pretty old stuff. It seems the older I get, the older my music gets. I won’t pretend otherwise! I’m sure there’s good stuff coming out these days, but this is what I’ve been playing, and I’m sticking by it.
Happy listening,
Beto

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20251220-240548-footer&t=8&refcode2=240548_444211_dMW4Fp&akid=240548%2E444211%2EdMW4Fp)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121666086/590202159/-2063340125?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjNjYjVmNy1iY2RkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X7HKeewaNAxCbaqDt3ile-e2Ynb_cHNvpy1A5cpm3Fc=)
Friend,

At the end of this email, I’m going to ask you to **[chip in $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121666088/590202166/-2063340125?refcode=em-12.20.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjNjYjVmNy1iY2RkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X7HKeewaNAxCbaqDt3ile-e2Ynb_cHNvpy1A5cpm3Fc=)** toward my re-election campaign. But before I do, please let me explain the stakes ahead of our public filing deadline.

**This year has been extremely challenging. The second Trump Administration has been even more anti-worker than the first -- putting billionaires and special interests ahead of the needs of working families, shutting down the government for almost two months to block affordable healthcare, and escalating attacks on our democracy.**

I understand how hopeless these times can feel. I’m proud that despite the extreme headwinds, I’ve made progress for our communities -- passing legislation to increase veteran care, delivering funding for infrastructure improvements, and ensuring public education in Illinois stays funded.

But it’s clear that there is work to be done that is impossible with the GOP House majority. Speaker Johnson is refusing to even allow a vote to protect ACA subsidies that expire before the end of the year. That’s unacceptable.

The good news is that Democrats are only three seats away from House control -- and IL-13 is critical to make it happen. And with less than 100 days until the Illinois primary, I need your support now to build the voter outreach we need to fend off my GOP challengers.

**[If you’re able, $3 or any amount that feels right for you would immediately go to work defending this seat and increasing Democrats’ odds of flipping the House majority next year. I’d love to see your name on the final FEC report of the year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121666090/590202172/-2063340125?refcode=em-12.20.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjNjYjVmNy1iY2RkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X7HKeewaNAxCbaqDt3ile-e2Ynb_cHNvpy1A5cpm3Fc=)**

clean_body: | = Friend, At the end of this email, I’m going to ask you to = toward my re-election campaign. But before I do, please let me explain the stakes ahead of our public filing deadline. This year has been extremely challenging. The second Trump Administration has been even more anti-worker than the first -- putting billionaires and special interests ahead of the needs of working families, shutting down the government for almost two months to block affordable healthcare, and escalating attacks on our democracy. I understand how hopeless these times can feel. I’m proud that despite the extreme headwinds, I’ve made progress for our communities -- passing legislation to increase veteran care, delivering funding for infrastructure improvements, and ensuring public education in Illinois stays funded. But it’s clear that there is work to be done that is impossible with the GOP House majority. Speaker Johnson is refusing to even allow a vote to protect ACA subsidies that expire before the end of the year. That’s unacceptable. The good news is that Democrats are only three seats away from House control -- and IL-13 is critical to make it happen. And with less than 100 days until the Illinois primary, I need your support now to build the voter outreach we need to fend off my GOP challengers. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Nikki | = = = Nikki is a champion for working families – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America.
