name: James Talarico
subject: Exceptionally honest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Hey Peter, I will keep this short so you can get on with your Saturday. But I need to be honest and ask a favor.
Our fundraising slowed down quite a bit this week, and we’re pacing behind our goals. I get it. Politics is often the last thing we want to think about around the holidays. There’s so much going on already, and a lot of folks have long to-do lists.
But in this new and much more expensive race, we can’t afford to fall behind our goals. And the truth is everyone will know if we do when we make our numbers public after the FEC deadline this month.
So I’m hoping our top supporters can help turn things around before the holidays. We have a lot of ground to make up, but it all works when everybody gives a little.
[**Can you contribute $5 or whatever you can spare to fund our movement to take back Texas? Every dollar will be immediately put to work to reach voters in every corner of our state.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251220-1-ak&t=1&akid=326%2E1347274%2EAtIaHs)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/506?c0=jt-em-launch.3s2pDp&refcode=em251220-1-ak&t=20&akid=326%2E1347274%2EAtIaHs)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/505?c0=jt-em-launch.soFUPy&refcode=em251220-1-ak&t=21&akid=326%2E1347274%2EAtIaHs)**

****
Winning this race and flipping this seat could give us the majority we need in the Senate to expand health care, fully fund our public schools, get Big Money out of politics, and start reducing costs for working families instead of giving tax cuts to billionaire mega-donors.
If we can make up enough ground today, it’ll keep us on track to meet our goals and win this race.
James

[**Check out our online store!**](https://store.jamestalarico.com?utm_source=em_footer&utm_campaign=em_footer) This is a grassroots movement to take back Texas for working people. James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=29&akid=326%2E1347274%2EAtIaHs).
clean_body: Hey Peter, I will keep this short so you can get on with your Saturday. But I need to be honest and ask a favor. Our fundraising slowed down quite a bit this week, and we’re pacing behind our goals. I get it. Politics is often the last thing we want to think about around the holidays. There’s so much going on already, and a lot of folks have long to-do lists. But in this new and much more expensive race, we can’t afford to fall behind our goals. And the truth is everyone will know if we do when we make our numbers public after the FEC deadline this month. So I’m hoping our top supporters can help turn things around before the holidays. We have a lot of ground to make up, but it all works when everybody gives a little. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Winning this race and flipping this seat could give us the majority we need in the Senate to expand health care, fully fund our public schools, get Big Money out of politics, and start reducing costs for working families instead of giving tax cuts to billionaire mega-donors. If we can make up enough ground today, it’ll keep us on track to meet our goals and win this race. James Paid for by Talarico for Texas Talarico for Texas PO Box 14508 Austin, TX 78761

body:
Epstein’s survivors told Congress to follow the money. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWFAwxvDY77GKhWMcf93FFAc4F_H2QejQvoeaWM7gb4Mqk0l-lfYiJWbc_OwMuh5-QqqkS6s1nZQbHWTypJuHDEBtXwnUchAv-4dMb-vHHO2ZTwtXCm_NrzXjG8Xj-O_CFMv_NNgamQgKFe77gyG9pWqAwgVP-ziQiTOuxsQKLPaOCOah_so7f2wMaiAtu3sXsK7ogCKn8w5Zd_QuI7VabRPOFuyfnp62gzhDZl0R32alZQjjwnWrZdsGAPTsa_KXgZullhZLcm1TZh9JH4W0lJqxK17OJnDJ5btXcRHg3Gd4/4ml/K-OqqQ_jSeW083F3W8bulw/h0/h001.rclQvxiqHXefaHhKybKAJTVpDCmF_6kW2eJZCsj5o-U)
---
Friend, Yesterday marked the Justice Department’s deadline to release their files on Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell, and they released heavily redacted pages. **We still need the full, unredacted Epstein files to see the complete picture of who was involved in these horrific crimes.** **I** **listened directly to survivors of Epstein’s sex trafficking** , including people who had been abused at 13 or 14 years old. **They told Congress over and over again to “follow the money.”** The Treasury Department has information about more than 4,000 wire transfers connected to Jeffrey Epstein, totaling more than $1.5 billion. **So I’ve been pushing the Treasury Department to release Epstein’s financial transactions, which will reveal co-conspirators and more.** **I’m also demanding big banks testify about how they’ve protected Epstein and enabled his crimes to continue.** For more than 15 years, big banks like JPMorgan and Bank of America ignored evidence of Epstein’s sex trafficking, repeatedly failing to file legally-required Suspicious Activity Reports—and profiting off this systematic abuse. [**Join me in demanding justice for Epstein’s survivors: Call on Congress to hold big banks accountable for enabling sex trafficking, and demand the Secretary of the Treasury stop protecting pedophiles and release Epstein’s financial transactions now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila99yu5r959HpLvJIPbi7preL5fc1cbSvkYeHORzAvI6E-AFEC_5XkQyn8GAoXijCdBdycdgPFVgDrYht1GqToa-K0OQiXmzl5vRuC7dPfZA6Uy9OKfgGfAyJllIDJZ4CuSTI-_zx7D82mcjQVHYLh2O48cHfOBJHjrXpCSaOql4WWrY1_3zn23oiWLsbITq8METdSNDlwSg7vP7_94p6akpabGSWTBlwUDZPukEVUSKO1XtQg17ikAylj2YAkfVTKuvUxQDi_CPf7na15ZHwVKYJRpexCKeDLUltAbcqMQLBaMwwp-vTAm7NPkSRRqqQn23m8TZqOnyP3K9yPj8QPD8t6RTrG9khaNQV-i5419zBcs5tGnhXAXpraaeO7RB5IfWACVimwt-VJ4ObHfCzJMJ7CjJ62qIkZzCarpAQRtPfQvyjed7Trv5TmLZaQ4Y5qF-kq1usnXX4hbMoKtdTUKGMNgioaFDg2-P9l69N4gwMqtPh16LWX_18wIJYJcDjspnT0DeRtG8BBjI9DBRWiGUE5ENr8nSSZjP7i94g6X10eonMEVjJyVYcUDWwtiGxKw/4ml/K-OqqQ_jSeW083F3W8bulw/h1/h001.MJLdBjf0zbmrpnBXsXv0tt6ipwXIRLtKbssE1zE9vWM) | [ACT NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila99yu5r959HpLvJIPbi7preL5fc1cbSvkYeHORzAvI6E-AFEC_5XkQyn8GAoXijCdBdycdgPFVgDrYht1GqToa-K0OQiXmzl5vRuC7dPfZA6Uy9OKfgGfAyJllIDJZ4CuSTI-_zx7D82mcjQVHYLh2O48cHfOBJHjrXpCSaOql4WWrY1_3zn23oiWLsbITq8MEDYJAqAeR3OdqFdfqgDMtCp5MeV4yDGWDm7eZiUwrmVdsaVoDoDYTDvq7rflJ8ryiTZ2pGX1pyF3--rxBvegF7N6Yr0OZTnG9tSOXOowHz6K_k7tIB3gFEkW4RHe89uIIID8xZI3_W8FRdiWL4fIxfZ3AeTz6vSj2PIUBZbMkTHIzNwtllHMZL0rjFoNbSf6-pBCrFGBnqjxM3yTgTSfpKN8u-WSUWbDr7seWorG2rStueyn1pJ-cmBtlU5e5AWLCG5S6JQpM0xRhsNXXSeLIa9hepfjpTUkSkDebU0vp39Tbpg1dtsdqKIf2KCIdcIMbaPscSF5K_Y8VFXH69wEQDHJlmzmMvNXIVmlnExelp08ooEZnrzBDedDwX6KHg7Fc/4ml/K-OqqQ_jSeW083F3W8bulw/h2/h001.OJ6tHVDw9nUhEDV60XbItnsSOVi5va3AocXQ0vmAXq0)
---
I’m part of the House Financial Services Committee, where I’ve pushed to subpoena unredacted financial transactions and advance policies to ensure we know the full truth, so we can hold perpetrators accountable.
We already know that **JPMorgan opened 134 accounts for Epstein and processed over $1 billion in suspicious transactions**. Even after he was a convicted sex offender.
Deutsche Bank, Bank of America, and Bank of New York Mellon all allowed similar red-flag transfers—such as payments to victims, co-conspirators, and oligarchs—without filing Suspicious Activity Reports.
**In violation of the law, these banks waited to raise the alarm until after Epstein was arrested and after he died.**
**Epstein’s countless victims deserve a complete and thorough investigation. They deserve justice and the full story, including why banks only reported this activity after Epstein’s 2019 arrest**.
We must hold big banks accountable for supporting and enabling human trafficking. I’m demanding full investigations in Congress to confront this, including requiring these banks to testify before Congress. Otherwise, the financial system will keep protecting predators.
We also need **more public pressure** on federal lawmakers and the Trump administration to release the full files.
[**Please sign if you agree: Federal lawmakers must investigate Wall Street’s support for Epstein, and the Trump administration must release the full files—including financial transactions connected to Epstein.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila99yu5r959HpLvJIPbi7preL5fc1cbSvkYeHORzAvI6E-AFEC_5XkQyn8GAoXijCdBdycdgPFVgDrYht1GqToa-K0OQiXmzl5vRuC7dPfZA6Uy9OKfgGfAyJllIDJZ4CuSTI-_zx7D82mcjQVHYLh2O48cHfOBJHjrXpCSaOql4WWrY1_3zn23oiWLsbITq8MEPbyvGLi7wixb9VKtq1rr-uLOFQ6vhV-JIwa8Lat62CAl1-oyo-q4jREjUEPAexbZMocBfqHLkMeEtir0MH5mLIj0pbwMKJng-23mlwHVd79Wnp-xAIIkudutyLDqt_vgjE7c8oe4zWJUxVgrMTuQkvYcycyX7G_k-OgONrTsqNfNZBx7i-7II7JmsGUw8XZAuWGneY8VXvXjKwR51jb20YuFfUrIrs5MvEg-ridWPOGKzmPvMHe3KiqVB0aM-CS5YFBbbFH__WsOJCCtR1FX0ljL1vK8juuFIv_qxMFSaHdRs4aF6BsVFoc0J9yfKrnip1tqKIgpETX2wJLP8DIbqRwV_9Kks5UCp86mHF5RR5t_FxnZr2uKY-Cdp97VmLea/4ml/K-OqqQ_jSeW083F3W8bulw/h3/h001.zuhk2-ZVFq6PnPjtkCSyJxXS_UnwVs_k3TTws5wxnUc)
Thank you. Together, we will continue to hold the powerful to account and fight for policies that protect survivors and deliver justice.
In solidarity,
Rashida

body:
Far-right Mike Lindell announced his campaign for governor.
_Hi Peter __– Gov. Tim Walz is running for reelection in Minnesota, and there've been developments in his race that he asked to share with you all. I'd appreciate it if you'd give his note a read and show your support for his race today._ _-Andy_ Peter,

**MAGA extremist and MyPillow CEO Mike Lindell just officially launched his campaign for governor of Minnesota.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121670538/590214017/-599933326?refcode=em25_251220_walz_fndt_gq_act___TW_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251220_walz_fndt_gq_act___TW_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=3da8b4da-c1dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2RhOGI0ZGEtYzFkZC1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VHrNrrcujebvwXg3gbBNAvy-eBSkRgCulbQlPkDuyR0=) Lindell has made a name for himself kissing up to Donald Trump and pushing far-right conspiracy theories, especially around the 2020 presidential election results — not to mention selling subpar pillows. He’s a snake oil salesman caught up in multiple legal fights who wants to bring Trump extremism to Minnesota.

As crazy as Lindell seems, he could become the Republican nominee and win — _especially with the backing of Trump and his billionaire donor network._

| Fellow Patriot,
---
| Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus.

He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness.

And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible.

I saw it up close -- _Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. _

But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything.

_**He started observing the Sabbath. **_

Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance.

_But as an act of obedience. _

As a way of saying, **_" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." _**

Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped.

He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield.

No email. No media. No work.

He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children.

It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much.

But over time, it changed him.

And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned...

| Fellow Patriot, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book.

It's not a culture war manifesto.

It's a call to stop.

To rest. To breathe. To return to God.

**Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. **

Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away.

Trust that God is in control.

Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship.

**In _Stop, in the Name of God,_ you'll discover: **

🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout

🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer

🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation

Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again.

That's the heartbeat of his final message.

| Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth.

He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth...

For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal.

Fellow Patriot, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage.

These are the very things Charlie gave his life for.

May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God...

A stronger love for your family...

And a renewed peace in your own soul.
---
| **For Charlie, **

**Justin Streiff **
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA

And a renewed peace in your own soul. | For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA | | | P.S.Stop, in the Name of God is Charlie Kirk's final message -- written in obedience, shaped by Scripture, and grounded in trust in the Lord. | | 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

[Experience the leaked NASA recording before it’s erased forever.](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=9e6f437aaa994215aa981f3b60a9c856&_e=MIuVNHCTbFuWXitwLUxN_PXXcqzqPs1dqZHK-onK6sceO9sKfStJzGzfJMyWpOiDwwEDeQ4GQlWHl2FcaQWt8g0p-3ad5eFCGwu7XAzt9LkvugfGGIrShVZj_NEyVWwNHAnWp8Yd40cmtqMqF22h7G5M9Mtu3Z-FWhCkBUAUqgXrvyDsedc5esqJpCiTbFVX9V8sNrPRZTOdYewDC_1QxindtMTKtihMJsDK55ET7JqyI4REovJ46T2EOefW0krSCPzQXDFqardbXJEusGh5iPz1NRW05e2hNxfGHBDt2tKT-GCwLCBFj6EhWIHx9nvXKsrvyw6D82lhfXgQUPh92VOVXNltxFVeZMXCOFssUlmHNMJEMwlVMbsg_3z5LmT4SEMYH8JdUV5mbsf4OoNgq6bGrdGMMyOFgOH_MkS1uPrruS4KDr4DHGZ9nhhbtcpL-VmgkapkXerU6hKwUQyiaAPRLc16fE-3rv_MXkuSedFD_RQ_9atOfoa0U0T2WQTlo1AW6_W334bEjbhK2_00q-7x-0EWDkldtAnZSAXaVckq-SZZczChbpMM6F0ji3SODKFbUYkKUm6xQiOqkJyDgw%3D%3D)
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

clean_body: NASA fought to bury Armstrong’s most chilling revelation.| | | | December 20 | | | | | Warning Audio Surges Online—Moon Truth Revealed | | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. name: Roy Cooper
subject: Why Trump came to my backyard
body:
I talked about this on MS NOW.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=197%2E124072%2EU-Kskh)
Yesterday, while Donald Trump held a rally for his hand-picked candidate, I spoke with Ali Velshi on MS NOW — did you catch our conversation, Peter? [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3201?t=7&akid=197%2E124072%2EU-Kskh) While Trump and Whatley were on that rally stage trying to make North Carolinians forget how costly their reckless agenda has been, I spoke about the challenges folks are facing day in and day out. **I know what matters to North Carolinians: lower costs, affordable health care, a healthy planet for our kids to inherit, good schools, and so much more. I will never stop fighting for these priorities.** **[You know I’m in this race for everyday North Carolinians, Peter. Now, I need to know if you’re with me — because this race is just too consequential to sit out. If you’re able, I’m humbly asking you to chip in and help us stand up to Trump, Whatley, and their billionaire right-wing donors.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3201?t=8&akid=197%2E124072%2EU-Kskh)** Peter, Trump came to my home county because he wants North Carolinians to know that Michael Whatley will be a yes-man, ready to rubber-stamp his dangerous agenda. Trump knows North Carolinians might choose me to serve in the U.S. Senate instead, and he doesn’t want a Senator who is unafraid to stand up to him. And now, because he’s turned the spotlight on this race, we can expect the MAGA donor machine to come after us. **[I’m not afraid of a tough race, Peter, but I’ve never won alone. Investing in our movement right now allows us to stay competitive in what experts predict will be the most expensive U.S. Senate race on record. Please donate if you can, and help me stand up to the national GOP.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3201?t=9&akid=197%2E124072%2EU-Kskh)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3202?t=10&akid=197%2E124072%2EU-Kskh)

Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

name: Team Walz
subject: Who did Trump back last night?
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
Donald Trump made it official: he’s backing Mike Lindell for Governor.
# [](https://act.timwalz.com/go/195?refcode=em20251220-327&t=1&akid=327%2E34582%2E8lyTtW)
[](https://act.timwalz.com/go/215?t=2&akid=327%2E34582%2E8lyTtW)
In case you missed it, Peter: Donald Trump has officially backed Mike Lindell for Governor.
At a rally last night, he said, “Mike Lindell deserves to be Governor of Minnesota. That man suffered... he fought like hell. That guy deserves to be governor. I hope he does great. He deserves to do great.”
It shouldn’t surprise us that one snake oil salesman is backing another. But we’ve seen what happens when we elect a con man to the highest office in America. We can’t let it happen here in Minnesota.
That’s where you come in, Peter. We have to fight back against this Trump-backed candidate immediately.
**[Can you rush $5 to ensure we’re able to defeat Mike Lindell and Donald Trump?](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251220.-5gOTw&amount=5&refcode=em20251220-327&t=3&akid=327%2E34582%2E8lyTtW)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251220.-5gOTw&amount=5&refcode=20251220-327&t=22&akid=327%2E34582%2E8lyTtW)**
— Team Walz

**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251220-327&t=23&refcode2=327_34582_8lyTtW&akid=327%2E34582%2E8lyTtW)**

body:
(it’s a surprise!)

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121671371/590216294/1328794144?refcode=ea.97d6b13c-c4dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ms=ea.97d6b13c-c4dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3ZDZiMTNjLWM0ZGQtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTFlYzhjNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NY5VyVG98M9-xYe62m_i02BOW45uBG1S5WJfqApGCW0=&emci=defff788-f0dc-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=97d6b13c-c4dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=4823105)
---
Tomorrow is a big day around here! Jane Fonda turns 88, and we’re getting ready to surprise her with a birthday card signed by the people who walk alongside her in this fight (yes, that’s YOU)!! Jane often says, **_“Anybody can be young. Only the lucky get to be old.”_** And she has shown us what that luck looks like: a life lived with courage, purpose, and an unwavering commitment to people and planet. For decades, she’s stood up when it mattered most, reminding us that aging doesn’t mean slowing down, that hope is an action, and that joy and resistance can live side by side. So many of us are here because she showed us what’s possible. **So this birthday, we want her to feel just how deeply she’s loved.** **[Our goal is to gather 2,000 signatures by tomorrow night, and we’d love for you to be one of them! Will you take a moment to sign Jane’s birthday card and leave her a message of appreciation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121671372/590216295/-2030708740?refcode=ea.97d6b13c-c4dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ms=ea.97d6b13c-c4dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3ZDZiMTNjLWM0ZGQtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTFlYzhjNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NY5VyVG98M9-xYe62m_i02BOW45uBG1S5WJfqApGCW0=&emci=defff788-f0dc-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=97d6b13c-c4dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=4823105)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121671373/590216296/-2030708740?refcode=ea.97d6b13c-c4dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ms=ea.97d6b13c-c4dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3ZDZiMTNjLWM0ZGQtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTFlYzhjNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NY5VyVG98M9-xYe62m_i02BOW45uBG1S5WJfqApGCW0=&emci=defff788-f0dc-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=97d6b13c-c4dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=4823105) Thank you for your support, Team JanePAC P.S. **[Check out our official JanePAC merch so you can have a little piece of Jane with you wherever you go.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121671374/590216297/850768488?utm_source=email&refcode=ea.97d6b13c-c4dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ms=ea.97d6b13c-c4dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3ZDZiMTNjLWM0ZGQtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTFlYzhjNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NY5VyVG98M9-xYe62m_i02BOW45uBG1S5WJfqApGCW0=&emci=defff788-f0dc-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=97d6b13c-c4dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=4823105)** Every purchase supports the fight for bold climate action.

I can’t wait to share this recipe with you.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121672133/590218831/1239926708?refcode=ea.a6ba945c-c5dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ms=ea.a6ba945c-c5dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmJhOTQ1Yy1jNWRkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aDpyodU3Xqe6utiXjqYz8NAsjD_fCYuNXbYC7YfmKwE=&emci=bacb9178-9cdb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=a6ba945c-c5dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=51844520) Friends, Phil here. **\----Original Message----**
**From:** Phil Weiser
**Date:** Wed, Dec 10, 2025 at 5:05 PM
**Subject:** [RSVP] Make my Bubby’s rugelach with me!
> It’s that time of year, friends. Holiday treat season is here! 🥐 The support you’ve shown this campaign has been full of sweetness, and we’d like to give back. **[If you make a contribution of any amount, you’ll get an exclusive invite to our virtual rugelach-making class on December 21 — plus a copy of my grandmother’s recipe. Save your seat at our virtual rugelach class! >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121672143/590218839/1490691382?refcode=ea.a6ba945c-c5dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ms=ea.a6ba945c-c5dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmJhOTQ1Yy1jNWRkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aDpyodU3Xqe6utiXjqYz8NAsjD_fCYuNXbYC7YfmKwE=)** In case you aren’t already a devotee, rugelach is a traditional Jewish cookie often made around holidays like Hanukkah (which is just around the corner). They’re commonly filled with raisins, jam, and chopped nuts. That’s how my Bubby made them. We have added the innovation of making them with chocolate chips. Between the buttery, flaky dough and the sweet filling, it’s the perfect way to end a meal. | **DATE:** December 21, 2025
> **TIME:** 12:00 p.m. MST
> **DURATION:** 1 hour
> **WHERE:** Your Zoom link will land in your inbox once you’ve RSVPed

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: The far-right isn’t waiting — and neither can we.
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251220-1750-foote&t=1001&akid=1750%2E342411%2E6126rF ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

What if we told you we have four seats to defend next year?

What if we told you that attacks on Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida
are escalating every single day from Trump and the far-right?

What if we told you that next year gives us a real shot to take back
Democratic majorities?

The truth is simple: the Squad is targeted because we refuse to back down.
We speak truth to power, we organize to uplift the working class, and we
challenge the unjust systems the far-right is desperate to protect.

But the far-right isn’t waiting — and neither can we. That’s why we need
to gear up now, defend every seat, and build the progressive power needed
to win the fights that lie ahead.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251220-movement.ca_cxf&refcode=em20251220-1750&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1750%2E342411%2E6126rF ]Will you chip in $3 today to help the Squad Victory Fund
protect our champions and keep our movement strong so we can hit the
ground running in 2026?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251220-movement.ca_cxf&refcode=em20251220-1750&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1750%2E342411%2E6126rF ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

body:
Let me explain.
#
[](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1276?c0=mcb-em-20251220-1.hXfdZ4&refcode=em20251220-2600&amount=5&t=1&akid=2600%2E21716%2Ep0G5QR)
**$5.**
**$5** is the exact amount I’m asking you to chip in to our campaign right now.
**[CHIP IN](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251220-1.edUzbL&amount=5&refcode=em20251220-2600&t=2&akid=2600%2E21716%2Ep0G5QR)**
**December 31 marks our final FEC fundraising deadline of my first year in Congress, and I’m counting on your support to show the strength of our campaign heading into 2026.**
**$5** will have a powerful impact in helping me win re-election next year — and continue taking on the biggest fights in Congress, holding Donald Trump accountable for his cruelty, and legislating to make your life better.
**$5** will power our efforts to help Democrats take back the House and save our country.
**$5** will help prove that a different kind of politics is possible, one focused on hope and solutions.
And **$5** will go a long way to help us reach our end-of-year goal of bringing in 50,000 donations before we close out this year and file our last fundraising report with the FEC.
I understand that with so much uncertainty right now, not everyone who reads this email will be able to give $5, but if you’re in the position to do so:
**[Can you chip in $5 or any amount today? With less than two weeks left until our December 31st deadline, I’m counting on 8,500 people like you to step up and make a donation of any amount to help us reach our goal. If you’ve been waiting to donate, this is the perfect time.](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251220-1.edUzbL&refcode=em20251220-2600&amount=5&t=4&akid=2600%2E21716%2Ep0G5QR)**

Thank you,
Sarah McBride

body:

|

---
_So here are your options:_

**OPTION #1: Sit back and give up.** Trump would have a clear path to appointing himself as a king above the law, Social Security would be cut, and voting rights would vanish.

[_No action is required to select this option._]

**OPTION #2:** Get back in the fight to SAVE our democracy, REVERSE the MAGA agenda, and stop Trump before it’s too late!

Elise has made it crystal clear whose side she's on — and it's not New Yorkers.

She's shown us time and time again that she only works on behalf of Trump and his MAGA agenda. And the GOP is already gearing up to spend millions to bring MAGA destruction to New York's statehouse. But New Yorkers deserve a governor who works for them, not a MAGA loyalist seeking applause in D.C.

**Kathy Hochul has proven she's a fighter for New York** — protecting reproductive freedom, keeping communities safe, and making sure families can build a better life. She’s stood up to Trump's attacks before, and she'll do it again. But she can't do it alone.

This race is going to be one of the _closest_ and _most expensive_ in the country. If Elise and her MAGA allies smell even a hint of weakness, they'll flood New York with right-wing money and disinformation. EMILYs List is ready to go all in, but we need grassroots supporters like you with us from the very start.

clean_body: New Yorkers deserve a governor who delivers, not a MAGA loyalist seeking applause in D.C. | = Peter, meet Elise Stefanik: She's bragged about being Donald Trump's "top ally." She proudly calls herself "ultra-MAGA." And now, a new poll shows her within three points of Gov. Kathy Hochul in the New York governor's race. = | = Elise has made it crystal clear whose side she's on — and it's not New Yorkers. She's shown us time and time again that she only works on behalf of Trump and his MAGA agenda. And the GOP is already gearing up to spend millions to bring MAGA destruction to New York's statehouse. But New Yorkers deserve a governor who works for them, not a MAGA loyalist seeking applause in D.C. Kathy Hochul has proven she's a fighter for New York — protecting reproductive freedom, keeping communities safe, and making sure families can build a better life. She’s stood up to Trump's attacks before, and she'll do it again. But she can't do it alone. This race is going to be one of the closest and most expensive in the country. If Elise and her MAGA allies smell even a hint of weakness, they'll flood New York with right-wing money and disinformation. EMILYs List is ready to go all in, but we need grassroots supporters like you with us from the very start. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for standing with our candidates. – the EMILYs List Campaigns Team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. That breaks my heart. But it's exactly why I'm running for Congress.
For years, our district has been torn apart by chaos, cruelty, and a representative who never cared to represent all of us. People are ready for something new -- not noise, not stunts, but real leadership grounded in respect, service, and accountability.
No one expected we'd have a real shot to change the direction of this district. Not the pundits. Not the establishment. Certainly not the GOP.
But here we are -- because the people of Northwest Georgia are tired of being a national punchline. We're tired of being divided. And we are ready to build something better.
I'm running for Congress because this district deserves a representative who listens, who leads with integrity, and who understands that people come before politics. And for the first time in years, we have a path to win -- but only if we build the resources to compete against the Republican machine gearing up to keep this seat red.
Republicans are already pouring in cash. They know this seat can flip -- and they're terrified of losing the megaphone Marjorie Taylor Greene gave them.
[I need you with me. Grassroots support is how we show the country that this district is ready for a new chapter. Will you make a contribution today to help us bring real representation back to GA-14?](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014XKg8aCf3jeMSKTQWax7SLqtSRJaQqUMMElMobPWm3tKLgebFY9YXKt5Qa8i0KT1RKrHVlheX7uo9k1N2hSFJ3knw_tPmX7VFB2KIpet2fRJh-Fnn9pMyXAUTnLyrpi6PQqlnxuPcl-wnQ7-NKvwDmejSZl8LAHQ-Y2lObGei1txR-S32StidrDfRswrfkaxc_U7shbQKOVtIF4D9YvJD9ymgO50wMtb&c=FgPC3cQj-rF1_GfoGDu8rC18eDFRac686aNqXXuCD_qetDjOrVC1Jg==&ch=81GIR_jhZYGmQkhG2fXicOUF2TwmcuzFOp2jRI5WQjksJfuemhREZw==)

Peter –
Donald Trump is at it again – trying to abuse his power to protect his political allies and rewrite history. Jena was just interviewed on CNN to talk about Trump’s unlawful attempt to pardon Tina Peters for crimes she was convicted of on the state level. Watch her interview here → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg-cnn?refcode=251220-email]

Let’s be clear:
Trump has no authority to pardon Tina Peters. Peters was convicted of state crimes in a state court by a jury of her peers. Any so-called pardon is unlawful — and it will not go anywhere.
But that doesn’t mean Trump won’t keep trying.
This is part of a broader strategy we’ve seen before: undermine our justice system, retaliate against states that hold the line, and spread dangerous lies about our elections.
As Colorado’s Secretary of State, Jena stood up to Tina Peters – and won. As the next Attorney General, she will continue to defend the rule of law and protect Colorado from federal overreach and political interference.
But standing up to Trump and his MAGA allies takes resources, resolve, and a movement of people who believe no one is above the law.
If you’re with us, donate now to defend our democracy and the rule of law. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg-cnn?refcode=251220-email]

name: Deb Haaland
subject: A NEW self-funded GOP opponent just entered the race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
This is going to be a tough race.

| | | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1102?refcode=jtk98-fr-nd&t=1&akid=6352%2E400544%2Ez_MI5M)
---
Friend, I’ve got some important news that I had to share right away: **A self-funded GOP opponent just entered the race in New Mexico.**
_And get this, he’s already pledged to give his campaign $2 MILLION of his own money._

I urgently need your grassroots support to ensure my campaign can compete. _**[So please, will you chip in $5 right now to help me close the gap on my $50,000 goal and win in New Mexico?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2924?refcode=jtk98-fr-nd&amount=5&t=2&akid=6352%2E400544%2Ez_MI5M)**_
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2924?refcode=jtk98-fr-nd&t=3&akid=6352%2E400544%2Ez_MI5M)
---
**I’ll be honest: This is going to be a tough race.** It's already clear that the GOP is going to try to buy this race, and unlike my multimillionaire opponent, I can't just write myself a check.

I don’t come from wealth, friend. I have never had the means to self-fund a campaign. I was a single mom living paycheck to paycheck, relying on government programs like SNAP, WIC and Medicaid to help keep my child fed and healthy. **So I know what it's like to struggle — and I also know that it takes a village, in both life and in politics. I strongly believe leaders should make people’s lives easier, not harder. We all want good roads, safe communities, strong education, access to parks and affordable, healthy food to eat.**
That's why I’m running to be the next governor of New Mexico, to build a better future for working families. But I need your help to reach my midnight fundraising goal to make that a reality:

**I'm running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support from folks like you chipping in $5, $10 or whatever you can spare to help me go up against these self-funded multimillionaires.**_**[Please, will you chip in to help me win and keep New Mexico blue?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2924?refcode=jtk98-fr-nd&t=4&akid=6352%2E400544%2Ez_MI5M)**_

|
# [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121676511/590227195/1733485174?refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWY0YzZhOGMtYzlkZC1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eVL2JtPgDROSfNnGgSdRlGCb6SORsCvuupsF1VDuHp4=)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121676513/590227196/1733485174?refcode=em-12.20.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWY0YzZhOGMtYzlkZC1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eVL2JtPgDROSfNnGgSdRlGCb6SORsCvuupsF1VDuHp4=) Hi, David Hogg here, Parkland survivor and co-founder of Leaders We Deserve. **I'm reaching out to share the news that Leaders We Deserve has endorsed Randy Villegas in California's 22nd District.** **[I’ll explain why we are backing Randy, but first: Can you make a $3 donation right now to help Randy build a grassroots-powered campaign that can’t be ignored?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121676517/590227197/1733485174?refcode=em-12.20.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWY0YzZhOGMtYzlkZC1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eVL2JtPgDROSfNnGgSdRlGCb6SORsCvuupsF1VDuHp4=)** | | [DONATE $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121676522/590227198/1733485174?refcode=em-12.20.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWY0YzZhOGMtYzlkZC1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eVL2JtPgDROSfNnGgSdRlGCb6SORsCvuupsF1VDuHp4=)
---
When I first heard about Randy Villegas’s campaign, it reminded me why we started Leaders We Deserve in the first place.
Randy grew up in a working-class immigrant family in California’s Central Valley. His parents ran a small auto shop. They relied on Medicaid, food assistance, and public schools to get by.
He worked his way from that shop to earning a PhD, and now he’s running for Congress to fight for families like his own.
While establishment Republicans like his opponent David Valadao vote to gut Medicaid and hand out tax breaks to billionaires, Randy’s fighting for Medicare for All, affordable housing, and lower costs for families -- and he’s doing it without taking a dime of corporate PAC money.
That’s what real leadership looks like. Randy’s not a career politician -- he’s someone who’s lived the struggles he’s fighting to fix.
This is exactly the kind of next-generation leader we need in Congress -- someone who knows what it’s like to live paycheck to paycheck and still believe in a better future.
But this race could decide control of the House, and the GOP knows it. That’s why they’re flooding the district with corporate cash.
**[So I’m asking: will you chip in $3 or whatever you can to help Randy Villegas flip CA-22 and bring real representation to his Central Valley community?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121676528/590227199/1733485174?refcode=em-12.20.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWY0YzZhOGMtYzlkZC1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eVL2JtPgDROSfNnGgSdRlGCb6SORsCvuupsF1VDuHp4=)**

clean_body: | = = Hi, David Hogg here, Parkland survivor and co-founder of Leaders We Deserve. I'm reaching out to share the news that Leaders We Deserve has endorsed Randy Villegas in California's 22nd District. = | | = When I first heard about Randy Villegas’s campaign, it reminded me why we started Leaders We Deserve in the first place. Randy grew up in a working-class immigrant family in California’s Central Valley. His parents ran a small auto shop. They relied on Medicaid, food assistance, and public schools to get by. He worked his way from that shop to earning a PhD, and now he’s running for Congress to fight for families like his own. While establishment Republicans like his opponent David Valadao vote to gut Medicaid and hand out tax breaks to billionaires, Randy’s fighting for Medicare for All, affordable housing, and lower costs for families -- and he’s doing it without taking a dime of corporate PAC money. That’s what real leadership looks like. Randy’s not a career politician -- he’s someone who’s lived the struggles he’s fighting to fix. This is exactly the kind of next-generation leader we need in Congress -- someone who knows what it’s like to live paycheck to paycheck and still believe in a better future. But this race could decide control of the House, and the GOP knows it. That’s why they’re flooding the district with corporate cash. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for stepping up, David Hogg Co-Founder, Leaders We Deserve_ | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. To support Randy's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress PO Box 1346 Visalia, CA 93279 United States

Pramila’s building a campaign that’s powered by working people.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20251220-5728-footer&t=1&akid=5728%2E420207%2EkLcwHj)
Peter, every day when we log in to ActBlue to check on our grassroots fundraising, there’s one number that makes us incredibly proud:
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/51865?c0=pj-email-20251220.Toa7Nm&refcode=em20251220-5728&t=2&akid=5728%2E420207%2EkLcwHj)
**Our average online contribution this year is just $25.83.**
Since her very first campaign, Pramila hasn’t taken a dime from corporate PACs or lobbyists — and she’s been one of the loudest voices working to get big money out of politics for good.
Because when politicians take thousands from big corporations, they often work _against_ the interests of the poor and working class families they’re supposed to represent.
**Instead, Pramila’s building a campaign that’s powered by working people so she can stand up and unapologetically fight for Medicare For All, environmental justice, raising the minimum wage, and more.**
But Peter, she can’t do it without your support.
[**If you’re ready to help build our movement, elect more progressive candidates, and flip the House in 2026, can we count on you to pitch in our average online contribution of $25.83 today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/51865?c0=pj-email-20251220.Toa7Nm&refcode=em20251220-5728&t=3&akid=5728%2E420207%2EkLcwHj)

clean_body: Pramila’s building a campaign that’s powered by working people. Peter, every day when we log in to ActBlue to check on our grassroots fundraising, there’s one number that makes us incredibly proud: Our average online contribution this year is just $25.83. Since her very first campaign, Pramila hasn’t taken a dime from corporate PACs or lobbyists — and she’s been one of the loudest voices working to get big money out of politics for good. Because when politicians take thousands from big corporations, they often work against the interests of the poor and working class families they’re supposed to represent. Instead, Pramila’s building a campaign that’s powered by working people so she can stand up and unapologetically fight for Medicare For All, environmental justice, raising the minimum wage, and more. But Peter, she can’t do it without your support. In solidarity, Team Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Nikki, Team Benson
subject: Not normal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
In Michigan, even a normal governor’s race is usually close and competitive. But Jocelyn’s race is not normal.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=1164%2E181023%2EQ9nn6R)
Hi there — it’s Nikki, Jocelyn Benson’s campaign manager.
I’ll be blunt: In Michigan, even a normal governor’s race is usually close and competitive. **But Jocelyn’s race is not normal.**
This election will be _even more competitive_ thanks to Mike Duggan, a third-party candidate who is trying to derail this race.
The cherry on top? A recent analysis revealed that Mike Duggan is receiving huge campaign checks from GOP donors who have also supported Trump and the extreme Republican candidates.
**What’s happening here is clear: MAGA billionaires think that if they pump enough money into Duggan’s campaign, they can pull votes from Jocelyn and send Republican John James to victory.**
We’re not falling for it.
While pro-Trump, anti-labor megadonors power Duggan’s campaign, Jocelyn’s campaign is people-powered.
**[Jocelyn hasn’t accepted a dime of corporate campaign contributions, which is why she’s counting on your support to stay competitive and cut through the noise. Will you pitch in today?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251220_AM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=1164%2E181023%2EQ9nn6R)**

name: President Trump
subject: I’m attaching the letter I wrote to you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc
body:
It would mean the world if you read it all the way through!
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
[FULL TRUMP MEMO](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
**Friend
Top Patriot in the Country** **[December 2025]**
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
**12/2025**
Dear Friend,
A letter is just so much more personal, don’t you think so?
It’s very rare that I get to deliver good news myself – I am pretty busy these days – but this was something I had to take the time and do personally.
Let me be the very first to congratulate you on earning an invitation to the Trump Platinum Club – you’ve made it into the top 1% of supporters!
You are a cherished member of the America First movement, and I couldn’t imagine facing the challenges of the next three years without you by my side.
Please accept this invitation at your earliest convenience and let’s GET TO WORK!
[ACCEPT TRUMP’S OFFER](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
**[As soon as you accept your invitiation, my team will ship you a special MAGA Christmas gift from me Trump to your front doorstep.>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)**
Sincerely,
Donald J. Trump
45th and 47th President of the United States of America
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[ACCEPT TRUMP’S OFFER](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

name: Demand Justice PAC
subject: DRAW THE LINE: No Crony Judges
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Demand Justice PAC
body:
[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20251220-61012&t=1001&akid=61012%2E1407376%2E8WMr-b ]Demand Justice PAC[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20251220-61012&t=1002&akid=61012%2E1407376%2E8WMr-b ]Demand Justice PAC

Donald Trump is pushing through judicial nominees who reject basic reality
— nominees who won’t acknowledge the 2020 election results and who
describe January 6 not as an insurrection, but as a “political issue.”
These are people Trump wants deciding the fate of our rights and our
democracy.

And somehow, 18 Democratic senators are still voting YES on these
nominees: Coons, Durbin, Fetterman, Gallego, Hassan, Heinrich, Hirono,
Kaine, Kelly, King, Klobuchar, Peters, Reed, Rosen, Schiff, Shaheen,
Welch, and Whitehouse.

We need to say it clearly: You cannot claim to defend democracy while
handing judgeships to people who refuse to accept democratic outcomes.

That’s why we launched our [ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55563?redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdj-em-20251220-ncj%3Frefcode%3Dem20251220-61012&t=1003&akid=61012%2E1407376%2E8WMr-b ]No Crony Judges campaign — a campaign built
on one simple, non-negotiable truth: A vote for Trump’s nominees is a vote
against democracy.

There’s no spin. No nuance. No “judicial temperament” excuse that makes
this acceptable.

We’re calling this out. We’re naming names. And we’re building grassroots
pressure strong enough that no Democrat can ignore it.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55563?redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdj-em-20251220-ncj%3Frefcode%3Dem20251220-61012&t=1004&akid=61012%2E1407376%2E8WMr-b ]Stand with us today and urge Senate Democrats to vote NO on all of
Trump’s crony judicial nominees:

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55563?redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdj-em-20251220-ncj%3Frefcode%3Dem20251220-61012&t=1005&akid=61012%2E1407376%2E8WMr-b ]ADD YOUR NAME

In solidarity,

* * *
* * *
### The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication
### Reject Corporate Left Wing Journalism
[Support What We Do](https://substack.com/redirect/197bd505-446e-46e3-89af-f0114bbe13e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c8483859-6449-4250-acac-0b3a8354379b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If you are new to this four-part series, let me catch you up. Today's liberal white women (Karens) **[are destroying the nation,](https://substack.com/redirect/172a81b6-8ed3-4c72-8c1e-4dbe4c94922e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** voting for every weak politician whose bad policies are bankrupting us financially, culturally, and morally. The **[big government machine](https://substack.com/redirect/d685e775-7ceb-4929-a446-a34504475c01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and **[higher education](https://substack.com/redirect/03d0722c-98f1-477f-825c-806b3320a3c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** are two factories which produce these monsters and in previous posts I laid out my thoughts. Now let's do number three: the non-profit and philanthropy machine.
A recent article entitled "How George Soros Changed Criminal Justice in America" made me snarl. It is the kind of **[headline](https://substack.com/redirect/23ae272d-f689-4741-90d6-dec92b2f732b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** I expect from lefty media about their lefty sugar daddy. The recent article, a glowing 3,000+ words of Washington Post masturbating the vile old man is enough to make a rational man puke, and how the author or the editors could publish it without an NC17 rating is beyond me. Praise and praise of Soros' interest and vision, and his bottomless pockets which shifted the outcomes of District Attorney (DA) races to hard-core liberals in rural communities he could not find a map, let alone would deign to ever visit.
Only one small throw-away line to the increase in crime nationwide with the very dutiful and deferential caveat _" experts have said there was no single explanation"_ to the rise in homicides. Good girl... the money is on the table.
* * *
* * *
**[Together with Ifrah Law](https://substack.com/redirect/35fdc085-a644-4804-8f7f-e3c6c6d85f37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Ifrah Law heightens the success of iGaming clients through every phase of their business cycle**
Led by a managing partner who has been **[at the center of every significant court case affecting online gaming,](https://substack.com/redirect/35fdc085-a644-4804-8f7f-e3c6c6d85f37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Ifrah Law operates at the cutting edge of technology, innovation, and regulation.
Its lawyers represent industry players throughout the entire business cycle, from the formation of a corporation or licensing relationship, through marketing, partnering, growth, and disputes, to profitable exits.
We're proud to share that all partners at Ifrah Law have been ranked by Chambers and Partners, the gold standard for evaluating legal excellence worldwide.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/35fdc085-a644-4804-8f7f-e3c6c6d85f37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/35fdc085-a644-4804-8f7f-e3c6c6d85f37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
The non-profit and philanthropy world is a boiling bucket of Satan stew, with Soros and other mega-donor billionaires stoking the fire and force feeding it to the American people. How did Soros "change" criminal justice in America? By hiding it under the banner of advocacy and using our tax code to get away with it.
His numerous foundations with tens of billions of dollars in assets do two things for George. One, they serve as a tax-write off, and two, they hide the work of the organization from the scrutiny a government agency or business would receive if they tried to stick their nose in your business. Non-profits do not have to tell you their dealings or their plans, they do not have to disclose any board decisions, but let's be very clear right now, there are thousands of them plotting to come after you, and you are defenseless.
If Churches don't pay taxes then neither should Soros and his foundations, because those folks are way more devoted to their god than most Church goers I know.
Soros funds armies of activists who are choosing your DA, mayor, governor, and Congress.
Michael Bloomberg has foundations which spend every second of the day trying to take away your second amendment rights and shut down fossil fuel plants.
Pierre Omidyar, the Iranian-born founder of eBay, spent [$425million](https://substack.com/redirect/9335d016-120f-4efb-823c-e55aa85cad72?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) last year through one of his foundations, The Democracy Fund, to "promote free elections". Think about that... Kamala spent $1.5billion to lose the 2024 election, and in addition to that enormous sum, another 32% via Omidyar was spent to help her. But no Federal Election Commission disclosures here. No campaign finance rules. No donor-listed PACs or super PACs. Nope. This is a "non-profit" and the rules don't apply.
And now think about this... what do you think The Democracy Fund MEANS (not says, not writes, but actually MEANS) when they say "promote free elections"? Come on... can we stop with the bullshit? You know what they mean. They know you know what they mean, but if the asshats at "The Democracy Fund" said _" we are spending GOBS of money to make sure that convicted felons and newly arrived Mexicans and North African islamists vote in our elections by blocking voter ID laws and extending election day to three months of unprotected ballot drop boxes to ensure that democrats win"_ they wouldn't avoid such scrutiny.
It's why Soros (and the media whores who write his puff pieces) glowingly call his birthing of the crime wave "criminal justice reform" even if the "reform" is more akin to your treatment of the commode after Taco Tuesday and a half pack of Marlboro Reds.
And I've just scratched the surface of this bastardized subject. There are non-profits dedicated to every imaginable cause, spending billions each year, for the sole purpose of ruling over you outside of the rule of law.
In my first installation I mentioned the big government activists who have successfully banned gas stoves in multiple states. They get this nonsense from the think tank world. Rocky Mountain Institute **[proposed](https://substack.com/redirect/35f14f79-5f8c-4e85-a533-19f7ed599df5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** the "study" which showed black and brown children are disproportionately dying from gas stoves (hinting that racists like you want to keep your stove...) because they care deeply, deeply, about the children or kitchen appliances or the earth...
They care about something: their **[$160 million](https://substack.com/redirect/a57d932c-0d2a-4b7d-9580-15118672123c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "non-profit" and the CEO's $600k salary.
Non-profits love money. The baby-killer in chief at Planned Parenthood makes $900,000. The baby-ignorance-maintainer in chief Randi Weingarten head of the largest non-profit teachers' union makes $600,000.
It's always about the money. As with any mosh pit, only those looking to fight jump in, but if you start paying people, the punches get much harder. And we who just wanted to listen to music are all getting pushed around.
I'm stumped for solutions with this case. I believe deeply in free speech, and money is speech. On the one hand, the government has no right to prevent me from spending my money. I can buy the biggest, baddest sound system I want. On the other, even my kickass sound system is subject to noise ordinances, and after 11pm the cops can shut me down.
Government must protect me from the non-profit machine, the third leg in the devil stool of government, higher education and advocacy on which all of America is getting impaled.
We are all at the mercy of George Soros. My DA in rural Virginia was a George Soros selection, a Star Wars named, foreign born transplant to rural Virginia with no ties to the people, the community or the land, but hand-picked by Soros to bring "change". Oh, boy did she. Once she stopped prosecuting people and stopped calling crime... "crime," crime "went down" and she celebrated her change.
I don't have an answer, friends, but trust me, believe me, I am searching for one. Because we cannot survive like this. Destroying the U-Boat factories was essential to winning the ocean which was essential to the D-Day crossing which was essential to winning the war. Our elected R's are promising to take Berlin, but we're still on the shores of England, and worse, we are getting shelled every night.
The factories must be destroyed.
We are allowed to be tired. We may never grow weary. Keep fighting.
**Honor and courage.**
* * *
_**Daniel Turner is the founder and executive director of Power The Future, a national nonprofit organization that advocates for American energy jobs. He also runs a sheep and cattle farm in rural Virginia. Contact him at daniel@powerthefuture.com and follow him on Twitter @DanielTurnerPTF**_

Oh, boy did she. Once she stopped prosecuting people and stopped calling crime... "crime," crime "went down" and she celebrated her change. I don't have an answer, friends, but trust me, believe me, I am searching for one. Because we cannot survive like this. Destroying the U-Boat factories was essential to winning the ocean which was essential to the D-Day crossing which was essential to winning the war. Our elected R's are promising to take Berlin, but we're still on the shores of England, and worse, we are getting shelled every night. The factories must be destroyed. We are allowed to be tired. We may never grow weary. Keep fighting. Honor and courage. Daniel Turner is the founder and executive director of Power The Future, a national nonprofit organization that advocates for American energy jobs. He also runs a sheep and cattle farm in rural Virginia. Contact him at daniel@powerthefuture.com and follow him on Twitter @DanielTurnerPTF * The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication Reject Corporate Left Wing Journalism You're currently a free subscriber to . subject: Let’s make 2026 feel different
body:
The work begins today. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121679281/590230397/-1860252395?refcode=-footer-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjBlMTk5YmYtY2RkZC1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lZvlqn3Obg4D_qcQRCBindqzefXhTx-XMSoOWvThtKg=) | November 6, 2018. That was the day I was first elected to Congress, and the day Democrats took back the House in a historic Blue Wave. (Ok fine, it was actually a few weeks later that my race was called, but you get the picture). I remember feeling so excited, hopeful, and optimistic about the future. _The people fought back, and we won._ Now think about November 5, 2024. The day Donald Trump won last year and took full control of Washington. It felt scary. Empty. Hopeless. **As we look ahead to the 2026 election, I think it’s important to remember those feelings. Because if we want another Blue Wave, we cannot wait to get our message out. We have to start reaching voters now.** [_**That’s why I'm asking you to make a donation to help Democrats take back the House next year. clean_body: The work begins today. | = | November 6, 2018. That was the day I was first elected to Congress, and the day Democrats took back the House in a historic Blue Wave. (Ok fine, it was actually a few weeks later that my race was called, but you get the picture). I remember feeling so excited, hopeful, and optimistic about the future. The people fought back, and we won. Now think about November 5, 2024. The day Donald Trump won last year and took full control of Washington. It felt scary. Empty. Hopeless. As we look ahead to the 2026 election, I think it’s important to remember those feelings. Because if we want another Blue Wave, we cannot wait to get our message out. We have to start reaching voters now. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Thank you, Josh *

subject: New Sticker: Don’t Give Up The Ship

body:
During the War of 1812, in a battle at sea with the British, U.S. Navy Captain James Lawrence was mortally wounded. His crew were carrying him below deck for aid, but before he went down Lawrence issued a final order: “Tell the men to fire faster — don’t give up the ship.”
#

Team, we’ll get right to it. Here’s the newest sticker from the Mark Kelly store:
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-dec25-sticker/.XA8wdo&refcode=em251220-1-1m&t=1&akid=6305%2E6688874%2E-0vY0q)
[**If that’s all you need and you’re ready to get one, make a donation of ANY AMOUNT to this email and we’ll send it to you for free.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-dec25-sticker/.XA8wdo&refcode=em251220-1-1m&t=2&akid=6305%2E6688874%2E-0vY0q)
**[GET YOUR STICKER](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-dec25-sticker/.XA8wdo&refcode=em251220-1-1m&t=3&akid=6305%2E6688874%2E-0vY0q)**
But if you’d like to hear a little more about the significance of this sticker, especially now, let us explain.
During the War of 1812, in a battle at sea with the British, U.S. Navy Captain James Lawrence was mortally wounded. His crew was carrying him below deck for aid, but before he went down, Lawrence issued a final order: “Tell the men to fire faster — don’t give up the ship.”
This ship is ours. Do not abandon your comrades. Do not abandon your country or the Constitution. Do not give up, no matter the odds.
It’s a legendary rallying cry in the Navy, and in American history. And it’s an especially important one for Mark, a 25 year Navy combat veteran.
And with everything the Trump Administration has thrown at Mark over the last month, it sends a message: Donald Trump’s got the wrong guy if he thinks he can force Mark into silence.
[**So, if you want to join Mark and show everybody you’re with him, chip in any amount — any at all — and we’ll send you the sticker for free.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-dec25-sticker/.XA8wdo&refcode=em251220-1-1m&t=4&akid=6305%2E6688874%2E-0vY0q)

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: ICE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Trump campaigned on a promise that ICE would go after "the worst of the worst."
But in fact, over 70% of people currently in ICE detention facilities do _not_ have a criminal record. **So who _are_ they going after?**
They are going after 6-year-olds in Alexandria's district.
They are going after students and permanent residents for their political views.
They are going after Americans born and raised in the United States.
So today, **we're supporting two organizations fighting to defend immigrant families being targeted by ICE and build lasting power for immigrant workers** whose rights are being undermined by multibillion dollar corporations now more than ever.
[Will you make a $2 contribution today — $1 each for Worker's Justice Project and the Street Vendors Project — to support vulnerable immigrant communities this holiday season?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251220.WrYM48&refcode=em20251220-10448-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10448%2E2526796%2EWZ6mPF)
_100% of your contribution will go to these incredible community organizations._
**[Contribute](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251220.WrYM48&refcode=em20251220-10448-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=10448%2E2526796%2EWZ6mPF)**
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251220.WrYM48&refcode=em20251220-10448-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=10448%2E2526796%2EWZ6mPF)
New York is an immigrant city. Immigrant workers are its backbone — and when they are under attack, we must respond with solidarity and action.
Whether or not you can give today, thank you for standing with us in our fight for those without a voice.
Wishing you a happy holiday season,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20251220?refcode=em20251220-10448-P_FND_CHA_GOL&t=22&refcode2=10448_2526796_WZ6mPF&akid=10448%2E2526796%2EWZ6mPF)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20251220-10448-P_FND_CHA_GOL&t=23&akid=10448%2E2526796%2EWZ6mPF)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=10448%2E2526796%2EWZ6mPF) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=10448%2E2526796%2EWZ6mPF) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=10448%2E2526796%2EWZ6mPF) | [](https://bsky.app/profile/aoc.bsky.social?t=27&akid=10448%2E2526796%2EWZ6mPF)
---|---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [¿Hablas español?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/espanol-2025/?source=em20251220-10448-P_FND_CHA_GOL)
