|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121680793/590235687/-896966196?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20251220_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmYyYWQ2NS1kMGRkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KXzdELIAFI9zSEbC6sd5vXlx1SzYI9v-sEZrlWOUEqQ=)
Did you see what happened in the Tennessee special election a couple of weeks ago? In a congressional district that Trump won by 22 points in 2024, the Republican won by just under 9 points. _**That’s almost a 14-point shift away from the GOP**_**, and very good news for Democrats.** If every state shifted by that much in 2026, Democrats could _flip_ as many as seven seats: Maine, North Carolina, Ohio, Florida, Alaska, Iowa, and Texas. That would mean regaining the Senate. **But that’s a _big_ if. It’s going to take a lot of work to make it happen. name: Victor Marx
subject: This is my calling
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VICTOR MARX FOR GOVERNOR**
body:
Faith, Family, Freedom
The values that guide me are simple: protect families, defend faith, and safeguard freedom.

For years, my calling has taken me into some of the most difficult places imaginable. From war zones to trafficking corridors to communities devastated by violence, **I 've led more than 150 high-risk missions focused on rescuing and restoring the innocent.** That work exists because **God carried me** through a childhood marked by trauma, instability, and hardship. Through His grace, I rebuilt my life -- and I've spent every day since fighting for those who can't fight for themselves. **_This campaign is no different._** It isn't powered by insiders or special interests. It's powered by people who still believe in Faith, Family, Freedom, and the promise of a stronger America. We're already building real momentum, and we need to keep it going. Over the years, I've been blessed to walk alongside men and women of deep conviction--people who don't just speak about change but embody it in the way they live. One of those rare leaders I held in the highest regard was my friend, the late **Charlie Kirk.** After Charlie passed, his wife Erika told me that Charlie would want me to run, and she encouraged me to throw my hat in the ring. While I've never considered myself a politician--_nor do I intend to become one_ --I reached a point where I couldn't ignore the reality that our communities are being failed. **I knew I had to do something. ** _Thankfully_ , I'm not stepping into this fight alone. The values that guide me are simple: **protect families, defend faith, safeguard freedom, and steward the natural beauty we 've been entrusted with. **These are not just Colorado values -- _they 're American values._ The struggles we face here -- crime, government overreach, attacks on faith, rising costs -- are the same challenges pressing on families across the country. Turning Colorado around sends a message far beyond our borders: **that courage still matters, that conviction still wins, and that ordinary Americans can reclaim their future.** I believe deeply in that mission. _I 've lived it my entire life._ And I'm grateful to have so many determined patriots standing alongside me as we work toward a safer, stronger, more united future. clean_body: Faith, Family, Freedom The values that guide me are simple: protect families, defend faith, and safeguard freedom. | | | | | Hi Peter, My name is Victor Marx -- a husband of 37 years, father of five, grandfather, Marine Corps veteran, former pastor, and humanitarian who has spent decades serving families and communities around the world. I am also the conservative in the race for Governor of Colorado. I'm running because the challenges we're facing here reflect the challenges facing our entire nation. What happens in one state can strengthen -- or weaken -- the future of America. For years, my calling has taken me into some of the most difficult places imaginable. From war zones to trafficking corridors to communities devastated by violence, I 've led more than 150 high-risk missions focused on rescuing and restoring the innocent. That work exists because God carried me through a childhood marked by trauma, instability, and hardship. Through His grace, I rebuilt my life -- and I've spent every day since fighting for those who can't fight for themselves. This campaign is no different. It isn't powered by insiders or special interests. It's powered by people who still believe in Faith, Family, Freedom, and the promise of a stronger America. We're already building real momentum, and we need to keep it going. I want you with us in this fight, Over the years, I've been blessed to walk alongside men and women of deep conviction--people who don't just speak about change but embody it in the way they live. One of those rare leaders I held in the highest regard was my friend, the late Charlie Kirk. After Charlie passed, his wife Erika told me that Charlie would want me to run, and she encouraged me to throw my hat in the ring. While I've never considered myself a politician--nor do I intend to become one --I reached a point where I couldn't ignore the reality that our communities are being failed. I knew I had to do something. Thankfully , I'm not stepping into this fight alone. Thousands of patriots have already taken their place in this movement, The values that guide me are simple: protect families, defend faith, safeguard freedom, and steward the natural beauty we 've been entrusted with. These are not just Colorado values -- they 're American values. The struggles we face here -- crime, government overreach, attacks on faith, rising costs -- are the same challenges pressing on families across the country. Turning Colorado around sends a message far beyond our borders: that courage still matters, that conviction still wins, and that ordinary Americans can reclaim their future. I believe deeply in that mission. I 've lived it my entire life. And I'm grateful to have so many determined patriots standing alongside me as we work toward a safer, stronger, more united future. | | For Colorado and for America, Victor Marx P.S. If you've gotten this far, there's something I need you to know: You 're not just someone reading an email -- you're someone whose voice and values matter deeply in shaping the direction of this mission. , and your involvement strengthens the momentum we've already begun to build. -Victor | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | PAID FOR BY VICTOR MARX FOR GOVERNOR Registered Agent: Gregory Carlson | | P.O. Box 156 Florence, CO 81226

And now? [**_She's ruling on cases that will affect your life for decades._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71197?t=10&akid=23754%2E4449941%2EDSq_OG)

But here's what's shocking... We have NO IDEA what Democrats in your state think about her performance on the Court!!

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: We took a risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
This ad is helping introduce me, share what we’re fighting for, and build the kind of coalition it takes to win a competitive primary and general election.
# [ ](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/29?refcode=&t=1&akid=1450%2E251025%2EigqBGr)
ICYMI, we just launched our first TV ad!
[](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251220-1-ak.HxbZms&amount=10&refcode=em20251220-1447&t=3&akid=1450%2E251025%2EigqBGr)
Peter, I’m so excited to see our campaign’s message reach even more Michiganders, but I won’t sugarcoat it — going up on TV this early is risky.
It’s an expensive six-figure buy, and that decision left a real gap in our budget.
We made the call anyway because with 2026 right around the corner, it’s important that voters hear from us as soon as possible. **If they don’t, our opponents, corporate PACs, or the MAGA money machine could define our campaign in _their_ own words.**
This ad is helping introduce me, share what we’re fighting for, and build the kind of coalition it takes to win a competitive primary and general election.
**We stepped out early because we believe in this moment, but now, we need to make sure we can sustain it.**
[**Peter, donate $10 or whatever you can today to help us cover this ad buy and keep our message on the air:**](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251220-1-ak.HxbZms&amount=10&refcode=em20251220-1447&t=4&akid=1450%2E251025%2EigqBGr)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251220-1-ak.HxbZms&amount=10&refcode=em20251220-1447&t=23&akid=1450%2E251025%2EigqBGr)**
Your friend in the fight,
Abdul
* * *
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-footer?refcode=email-footer&amount=&t=24&refcode2=1450_251025_igqBGr&akid=1450%2E251025%2EigqBGr)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you, so thank you for reading this message. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails?t=26&akid=1450%2E251025%2EigqBGr)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=1450%2E251025%2EigqBGr)

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate.

Peter, I'm not letting politics get in the way of our work to drive Oregon forward. name: Charlene Fernandez, Chair
subject: We stand with Mark Kelly
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
The President threatened Mark Kelly's life for defending the Constitution. We stand with him — and we need your support. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121681128/590236626/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251220_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTEwOWZhYmYtZDNkZC1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=leRpin79luO66wKOmSbiCmg9CsZITjdL2qG_y1kOsSY=)
---
Hi there, As you probably heard, the President of the United States called for Arizona Sen. Mark Kelly to be hanged. **Let that sink in for a moment.** Senator Kelly made a video alongside military veterans and former members of the intelligence community with a simple message: service members have an obligation to refuse illegal orders. Trump's response? He called the Senator a "traitor" and said that, "in the old days, if you said a thing like that, that was punishable by death." Now the FBI is asking to question him. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth is investigating him and has threatened a court-martial. **The entire weight of the federal government is bearing down on a U.S. Senator for defending the Constitution.** Never mind that he flew 39 combat missions in Desert Storm. That he launched into space four times as a NASA astronaut. Or that he's served Arizona in the Senate with honor and integrity for over five years. **This is about more than Sen. Kelly’s record. It’s about standing up for any Arizonan who is brave enough to defend the rule of law in the face of an authoritarian regime.** **[Will you support our work of standing up for Sen. Kelly? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121681129/590236627/541746778?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251220_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTEwOWZhYmYtZDNkZC1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=leRpin79luO66wKOmSbiCmg9CsZITjdL2qG_y1kOsSY=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121681130/590236628/79744751?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251220_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTEwOWZhYmYtZDNkZC1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=leRpin79luO66wKOmSbiCmg9CsZITjdL2qG_y1kOsSY=)
---
Sen. Kelly put it well: "There's no telling what kind of storm we're heading into right now. We need to be prepared for any outcome."
That’s why we're preparing. We're organizing. And we're standing with Mark Kelly and other patriots every step of the way.
Thank you for standing with us,
Charlene Fernandez
Chair, Arizona Democratic Party
Arizona Democratic Party
PO Box 36123
Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123
United States **[info@azdem.org](mailto:info@azdem.org)** | **PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. GREG FREEMAN, TREASURER. WWW.AZDEM.ORG**

My work has always been rooted in building a brighter future for New Mexico — including making everyday life more affordable, advancing clean energy, and preserving public lands and waters for future generations. That hasn’t changed. But to protect all our progress, it’s more important than ever to support Democratic candidates up and down the ballot, flip **red** seats **blue** , and retake a Democratic Senate majority. **Grassroots support is how I was elected to public office in the first place. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | A Humanoid Robot You Have to See to Believe | At CES, Nvidia’s CEO dropped a bombshell: “This is the ChatGPT moment for robotics.” What followed stunned even seasoned analysts.A humanoid robot—powered by advanced AI—demonstrated real-world tasks with shocking precision. name: Voter Action Project Research Team
subject: Should we ban Congressional stock trading?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Straight from Politico: " A Senate committee voted to advance a bill that would ban stock trading by lawmakers, presidents and vice presidents — over objections from most Republicans and with a limited carve-out for President Donald Trump."
Sen. Josh Hawley (R-Mo.) introduced a bill barring members of Congress and their spouses from trading stocks. Hawley joined every Democrat on the Senate Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs Committee, voting to send the bill to the full Senate. It is unknown when, or if, Senate Majority Leader John Thune (R-S.D.) will bring it up for a vote on final passage.
We want to hear from voters in your area to get their feelings on the topic. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Should the President, Vice President, members of Congress, and their families be banned from trading stocks?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=122025_1yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=122025_1no&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=122025_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=122025_1&amount=20]

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m in this fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| I never planned on running for office again.

But I see what’s happening in Washington – and I can’t stay on the sidelines.

**I’m jumping in this fight: I’m running for Senate in 2026.**

_Why?_ Because Ohioans are working harder than ever, and they’re still falling behind.

_Why?_ Because wages are flat.

_Why?_ Because costs are rising.

_Why?_ Because the people in power are only looking out for their rich friends and corporate interests.

No one is fighting for Ohio workers and families in the Senate. But with your support, we can change that.

We can build a country where workers share in the wealth they create, where hard work pays off, and where everyone who works hard can afford a decent life.

This won’t be easy – and with Ohio being one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, we know there are many fights ahead. But if we stand together, we will win.

[**I need you with me, friend: Will you chip in $10 split with the Voter Protection Project right now to help me flip Ohio’s Senate seat and stand up for workers across the country?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/100006?t=6&akid=22308%2E878179%2E140IH4) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/100007?t=7&akid=22308%2E878179%2E140IH4)

In solidarity,

Sherrod

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=22308%2E878179%2E140IH4). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=22308%2E878179%2E140IH4).**

name: Lauren Underwood
subject: My friend, Haley
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I came into Congress with Haley Stevens. Here's what I saw

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1689%2E49239%2Ej3wkCy)
| | |
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10731?t=2&akid=1689%2E49239%2Ej3wkCy)
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10648?t=3&akid=1689%2E49239%2Ej3wkCy)
Hi null,

Lauren Underwood here, and I want to tell you a little about my friend and colleague, Haley Stevens.
Haley and I were both elected to Congress in 2018. I’ve worked side by side with her, and I can tell you firsthand: **Haley is one of the most effective lawmakers I’ve _ever_ worked with.**

I’ve seen her in committee hearings, caucus meetings, and late-night vote sessions – and she always shows up ready to fight for Michigan and deliver real results.
Now, Haley is running for Senate in one of the most competitive and expensive races in the country. Donald Trump has already endorsed her Republican opponent, and GOP billionaires are dumping millions into Michigan.
That’s why I’m personally asking: **[Will you chip in $5 or more to help Haley keep Michigan blue and flip the Senate?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10648?t=4&akid=1689%2E49239%2Ej3wkCy)**
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10648?t=5&akid=1689%2E49239%2Ej3wkCy)
---
I love working with Haley because we both make it a priority to listen to voters – that’s what makes an effective lawmaker.

Haley has fought for Michigan’s auto workers, expanded job training programs, and helped pass critical investments in manufacturing and clean energy. She doesn’t just talk about results, she delivers them.
But here’s the truth: Trump and his MAGA megadonors are desperate to flip this seat and win the Senate.

We can’t let that happen.

This race will be one of the closest in the nation, and I promise you: Every single grassroots donation matters.
**If you believe in leaders who get results, in public servants who fight for working families, and in building a future where everyone has a fair shot –[I’m asking you to chip in $5 and join me in standing with Haley Stevens today.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10649?t=6&akid=1689%2E49239%2Ej3wkCy)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10649?t=7&akid=1689%2E49239%2Ej3wkCy)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10650?t=8&akid=1689%2E49239%2Ej3wkCy)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10651?t=9&akid=1689%2E49239%2Ej3wkCy)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10648?t=10&akid=1689%2E49239%2Ej3wkCy)
---
Thank you for being in this fight, null.

Rep. Lauren Underwood
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10663?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=11&akid=1689%2E49239%2Ej3wkCy) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10653?t=12&akid=1689%2E49239%2Ej3wkCy)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

subject: Can I explain?

body:

name: Katherine Clark
subject: Reaching out on behalf of Nellie Pou
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2026frontlinepou?refcode=hjemail&amount=12 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2026frontlinepou?refcode=hjemail&amount=12]Hi friend,

I am Democratic Whip Katherine Clark, and I wanted to give you one important number.

$12

Yes, you read that right. That’s the amount we are asking you to chip in to Nellie’s campaign before her end of quarter deadline.

$12 because we are entering an election year, and your support is needed now more than ever.

$12 because the GOP is spending millions to unseat democratically elected representatives across the country, and only strong grassroots power will give us enough to fight back.

$12 because if November’s elections showed us anything, it’s that American people are fed up with the chaos the GOP has created.

We need your support to continue building the momentum needed to take back the House next year. Nellie Pou is in a critical district that we must keep in order to do that. So I’m asking, will you make a donation to Nellie Pou before their FEC deadline? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2026frontlinepou?refcode=hjemail&amount=12]

Thank you, friend. Together we’ll win this.

Katherine Clark
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pou_headshot_crop.jpg]

About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=a4cefd3d-d7dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6] Give Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=a4cefd3d-d7dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6]
Follow Nellie
https://x.com/NelliePou [https://x.com/NelliePou] https://www.facebook.com/senatorpou/ [https://www.facebook.com/senatorpou/] https://www.instagram.com/congresswomannelliepou/ [https://www.instagram.com/congresswomannelliepou/]

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: The message Charlie carried into eternity
body:
Before Charlie was taken... he wrote this...| | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=87c884b762794d0b843f246e2eb1c02b&_e=gZ3_Q6SPTJXOvbGkc8hxDOoLYAigs7VpXf5Dkwfn0DnylIHWy-sqBwOAlgHueEeNPr98X9JKQGjT0AnczqwlBADMCc6jXNBOmAzjB0UyJeyay8-yDxFnwyMr6GmROfVrJXYVsaEuoc1ohWXnQsafDvSj-GVx4ZQYDbAcXGDnoB8Tp_eL7D0StihZknmrmPMJ86msXRMq1fIHwG79LxBW3DH8djUeE7cZX-POMoqh7OfA8yHhHZ9iYGbIgDWutbuhth3Hf51Xprxit8YjbczwuzgZSHTtCFY3rwRA9ddVXUF-tgepPOetZfOc0ygTf_C8c7f41btCtbmHo550X8q09_nELCNXFqV9QcfpYMVvrKNKKM3UvdrJV5HO8I6qfCmeP0n0LuHBqqH9mGCw5pw0RELNEZdOQls7myja7fjoawYmy8Tr7WCl_OAaDjmdFJ5J7bVZAduwC6xUjABGzrqpOaMnVOrgzEkAJEJn2METqso8xdfWJxhTRqsInB-oiqgsnw0sX8gymAVrgLLbeZbETTRur0p8q1jB36ftdtyWjMWTlCrftSYgykLB1L6XfLA2zD1s7Yv4A1HgWQMfNKaPiUR6bNrSQchG6u7i_Tgn6ChagMMoDiOIBTLo3q5zzF34Z3XKbmYd2cuE5QB4zKbbRnw66_zbByyLWc5uVBH45u14JSYk1K_PiR-vSB-N_7mB)
---
| | Peter,
---
| | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus.

He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness.

And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible.

I saw it up close -- _Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. _

But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything.

_**He started observing the Sabbath. **_

Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance.

_But as an act of obedience. _

As a way of saying, **_" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." _**

Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped.

He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield.

No email. No media. No work.

He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children.

It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much.

But over time, it changed him.

And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned...
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=87c884b762794d0b843f246e2eb1c02b&_e=gZ3_Q6SPTJXOvbGkc8hxDOoLYAigs7VpXf5Dkwfn0DnylIHWy-sqBwOAlgHueEeNPr98X9JKQGjT0AnczqwlBADMCc6jXNBOmAzjB0UyJeyay8-yDxFnwyMr6GmROfVrJXYVsaEuoc1ohWXnQsafDvSj-GVx4ZQYDbAcXGDnoB8Tp_eL7D0StihZknmrmPMJ86msXRMq1fIHwG79LxBW3DH8djUeE7cZX-POMoqh7OdcGfw_hgn2ywRktfdI_O8cyAqlSLrhKzpcGtZcfzkxH1Z9C_XkTNqbEdZLd95VeTzP7Orq9I61Wi3pJVvCiIXIVkftHwnCZPb57WuJD1mLECVpyVDykLMOIsjBtFRvr2UkCSx1N4k7M5Gq4mcJ2jRH2ZQpNwixjbZsU01SdTGxdnhCis9PvOkSFOyGI_-yb-eAoJZ5PltrzrPiv-ZogDA-gOdWuQ3EHEggAkaoHA9w-bJw0UTA8Ml8SJzLhRnZEn0hzXKkovfOAzSwPY8tKTM62MWuXRYBUsEUPBwilOnqZ5mb7V6ZyP2bdvyF-eZ-sr3EoTOmpZxF7AJToflv_60WLy14BewjB7XHWWaYvNdGD1mG99eRo2tFn8fktubKTP5osKtn5FAT0Mt_nUOac1Gy0KTlrWW811i9Vl4h4-6KseezUvddGx_EvwRGoI7DvDbumnWiqV6FqcP6rqMomAOF)
---
This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust.

A book not about politics... but about peace.

**It 's called: _Stop, in the Name of God._**

**[And right now, when you make a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA, we’ll send you a copy — as our thank-you for carrying Charlie’s mission forward.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=87c884b762794d0b843f246e2eb1c02b&_e=gZ3_Q6SPTJXOvbGkc8hxDOoLYAigs7VpXf5Dkwfn0DnylIHWy-sqBwOAlgHueEeNPr98X9JKQGjT0AnczqwlBADMCc6jXNBOmAzjB0UyJeyay8-yDxFnwyMr6GmROfVrJXYVsaEuoc1ohWXnQsafDvSj-GVx4ZQYDbAcXGDnoB8Tp_eL7D0StihZknmrmPMJ86msXRMq1fIHwG79LxBW3DH8djUeE7cZX-POMoqh7OfmZrwHfoOjx8O2VQVhn9jr8qDgLYclk_Ly1Ia2GcGkin9jYNhJRlaIQhK0EJhv-452ROAl6bFidW74Ioqz11WLk_BebaWju_LBnk7tkPDoYfkQt7JlraX5SghOXEj-mFoA8Ns6JNvHw25aMSY7vvwhrimO84c2-M3QdiMcVOwfA3M8YOY4kgXPqhtMWbW6VDMvYsvFrahL25ZpwtTyCZuLpP9UhsDpnILGJbVJP6hTdMXaqbORsufRw6-94mtaOwRqdYkKhgl-0GleNat0bcchFxnoXpJusyIkOCkAN6Lg8AVquTr6MkuTu0wkQgHlTLL4izzWd-gJ7UNzWE46yXds6ZyODwjp1_Q8Q4-k1-Xw7QBjvkzSU2VtB1mLEEw0PRl8LMF83DTwL7MSe5XvLYLuaQmyThTF1cGK-94LPgGlFLaPGHMPF35oLOp2ZuvnzjoRKgVAgmY4tFkoWiUAmaOd)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie's Final Book**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=87c884b762794d0b843f246e2eb1c02b&_e=gZ3_Q6SPTJXOvbGkc8hxDOoLYAigs7VpXf5Dkwfn0DnylIHWy-sqBwOAlgHueEeNPr98X9JKQGjT0AnczqwlBADMCc6jXNBOmAzjB0UyJeyay8-yDxFnwyMr6GmROfVrJXYVsaEuoc1ohWXnQsafDvSj-GVx4ZQYDbAcXGDnoB8Tp_eL7D0StihZknmrmPMJ86msXRMq1fIHwG79LxBW3DH8djUeE7cZX-POMoqh7Ocz3vEP_BmWiEYc2Ju_MQlgCMdt-Ya5hr9oACShtr2g5m6e_Dzebpsc7vzzKhs1GdAUNY3DNbsA4kbnrS1uhSDyZvPXzf74BznXm3xpobwlFURjHSVHgYvN6rsRJQmGuoNsWiya1mS1xIaSW1T0xBe_7vrSQOyVCeZotr4_chgWy8o1uiK_2G3_z0o9F-rZ2DBfn_NmpOXLekiVZEM_OTjoP-ezSzChHLN3WiAxxmglgqT4ei6OHcpDg7Ye0Mdf_LUPXlVb2LGIiRLfBSRIP9Ej2JZiR8Y-vp3mNhnklPu9gmKPcSifRye157QvTzGOcC4uzP1ExkYNqS8xCvy5xYDw-H9SSQ-56LcYdoQADwt3Mf5MgsMRB0AyQbpkAEFiFUizKHbHgYwWgLdLy2txAHl0bPvwuhSzla52In-XMNrxYGW9MYjrNmu4lVdZUKch20e3wHGvlNdFBXo_jdWx4sdb)
---
Peter, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book.

It's not a culture war manifesto.

It's a call to stop.

To rest. To breathe. To return to God.

**Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. **

Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away.

Trust that God is in control.

Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship.

clean_body: Before Charlie was taken... he wrote this...| | | | | Peter, | | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud. He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus. He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness. And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible. I saw it up close -- Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything. He started observing the Sabbath. Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance. But as an act of obedience. As a way of saying, " God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped. He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield. No email. No media. No work. He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children. It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much. But over time, it changed him. And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned... This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust. A book not about politics... but about peace. It 's called: Stop, in the Name of God. Peter, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book. It's not a culture war manifesto. It's a call to stop. To rest. To breathe. To return to God. Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away. Trust that God is in control. Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship. In Stop, in the Name of God, you'll discover: 🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout 🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer 🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again. That's the heartbeat of his final message. Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth. He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth... For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal. Peter, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage. These are the very things Charlie gave his life for. May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God... A stronger love for your family... And a renewed peace in your own soul. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S.Stop, in the Name of God is Charlie Kirk's final message -- written in obedience, shaped by Scripture, and grounded in trust in the Lord. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

You fired Joe Biden and Kamala Harris and stopped their reckless open-border agenda. **But the people they smuggled in are still here — and they're still threatening Americans.**

**Among Biden’s imported Afghan nationals:**
🚨 A radical Islamist ambushed National Guardsmen blocks from the White House
🚨 A child sexual predator was arrested for “using force” against kids in Wisconsin
🚨 An ISIS terrorist was caught planning an Election Day massacre in Oklahoma City

Biden promised these people were **"fully vetted heroes." That was a lie. At least _55_ of his Afghan evacuees had hits on the __terrorist watch list__ — and he let them in anyway.**

clean_body: And Joe Biden imported these threats. This is unreal.| | | Peter, | | You fired Joe Biden and Kamala Harris and stopped their reckless open-border agenda. But the people they smuggled in are still here — and they're still threatening Americans. Among Biden’s imported Afghan nationals: 🚨 A radical Islamist ambushed National Guardsmen blocks from the White House 🚨 A child sexual predator was arrested for “using force” against kids in Wisconsin 🚨 An ISIS terrorist was caught planning an Election Day massacre in Oklahoma City Biden promised these people were "fully vetted heroes." That was a lie. At least 55 of his Afghan evacuees had hits on the terrorist watch list — and he let them in anyway. Biden and Harris’ open border policy imported chaos that is scattered across America, threatening our communities, our children, and our troops every single day. President Trump stopped migration from dangerous countries and launched mass deportations. But he needs Congress and Conservatives to finish the job. That’s why we’re backing critical reforms to supercharge deportations: dedicate ICE to immigration removals, strip away bureaucratic obstacles, and target employers who exploit illegal immigrant labor. 👉 Heritage Action - Rapid Response Team | Heritage Action for America is a 501(c)4 non-profit organization. # **[New Inflation Report Released](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
In an unexpected moment of live television candor, CNBC’s senior economics reporter Steve Liesman appeared momentarily stunned on Thursday morning as he reported the latest Consumer Price Index (CPI) numbers during Squawk Box. As the figures flashed across the screen, Liesman paused—gasped, even—before delivering a pleasantly surprising update: inflation was easing more than expected. The [...]

# **[Decision With Reservoir Raises Eyebrows](http://trk.libertyledger.-a7A)**
---
Just over a year after the devastating Palisades fire exposed critical failures in Los Angeles’ emergency readiness, city leadership has somehow managed to make things worse—shutting down the very reservoir that was bone-dry when firefighters needed it most. It’s the kind of staggering mismanagement that makes you question whether we’re dealing with a conspiracy... or [...]

# **[Greg Biffle Dies In Tragic Plane Crash](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/9f9Nl--CfOGfT_PW68jc-w)**
---
The world of NASCAR and the state of North Carolina were struck with profound grief on Thursday after news broke that former driver Greg Biffle, his wife Cristina, and their two children, Emma and Ryder, were tragically killed in a plane crash at Statesville Regional Airport. The crash claimed the lives of all seven people [...]

# **[Varet Comments On Congresswoman](http://trk.libertyledger._w)**
---
In a political blunder that would be laughable if it weren’t so revealing, California Democrat Esther Kim Varet managed to confuse one Black congresswoman with another—on her own campaign website, no less. While proudly touting an endorsement from Rep. Jasmine Crockett (D-TX), Varet’s team posted a photo of an entirely different Black woman, seemingly under [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._w)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/MTPuAxwIhoWYNHYOratDmA)

The tragic story unfolding in Reston, Virginia, is a chilling example of what happens when ideology is allowed to trump justice—and public safety pays the price. An illegal immigrant with a history of violent charges was released into the community, not once, but repeatedly, thanks to decisions made by officials who seem more interested in [...]

name: John Bisognano, NDRC
subject: I can’t thank you enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Supporters like you are the heartbeat of this movement
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121683754/590241882/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRjMGM5MzM4LWQ4ZGQtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTFlYzhjNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=71YkG3l8_d9mJkjYbSpBhcW6hbtE8qdvrrX9uiSjfQk=&emci=31685065-02dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=4c0c9338-d8dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, I want to start by saying thank you. As I reflect on the countless challenges we’ve faced this year due to Trump’s redistricting crisis, I’m grateful for dedicated supporters like you who stepped up when this movement needed you the most. In the words of A.G. Eric Holder, Jr., **“Democracy is a muscle: to make it strong, you have to exercise it.”** You’ve been doing that work every single day — whether you’re organizing, voting, speaking up, or donating to protect our democracy. Your impact in 2025 is undeniable. You helped take on some of the toughest fights we’ve ever seen. Together this year, we... Helped a fair election finally be certified in **North Carolina** despite Republicans’ six-month-long attempt to steal Justice Allison Riggs's seat after her victory in the state supreme court election. Achieved a Democratic trifecta in **Virginia** , with Abigail Spanberger elected governor with one of the widest win margins in recent Virginia Governor election history. Supported Proposition 50 in **California** — which was overwhelmingly approved by voters — to counter Trump’s power grab in Texas. Overcame an influx of special-interest spending to retain pro-democracy Justices Christine Donohue, Kevin Dougherty, and David Wecht on **Pennsylvania’s** highest court. Defeated Elon Musk’s millions in the highly contested **Wisconsin** Supreme Court race to retain Judge Susan Crawford’s seat. ... and more. As we look ahead to 2026, we are investing in leaders and races that are critical to the long-term fight for a fairer, more representative democracy. And I’m confident that, together, we’ll keep proving that our democracy can not only survive — but be made stronger and more resilient than ever, thanks to people like you. Here’s to the year ahead, John Bisognano
President,
National Democratic Redistricting Committee | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121683755/590241883/-1027206931?refcode=cul_ndrc_tier1_email_ThankYouBiz_email_20251220-NDRC-Tier1-ThankYouBiz_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=cul&utm_content=20251220-NDRC-Tier1-ThankYouBiz_&utm_campaign=ThankYouBiz&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRjMGM5MzM4LWQ4ZGQtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTFlYzhjNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=71YkG3l8_d9mJkjYbSpBhcW6hbtE8qdvrrX9uiSjfQk=)

clean_body: Supporters like you are the heartbeat of this movement | Peter, I want to start by saying thank you. As I reflect on the countless challenges we’ve faced this year due to Trump’s redistricting crisis, I’m grateful for dedicated supporters like you who stepped up when this movement needed you the most. In the words of A.G. Eric Holder, Jr., “Democracy is a muscle: to make it strong, you have to exercise it.” You’ve been doing that work every single day — whether you’re organizing, voting, speaking up, or donating to protect our democracy. Your impact in 2025 is undeniable. You helped take on some of the toughest fights we’ve ever seen. Together this year, we... Helped a fair election finally be certified in North Carolina despite Republicans’ six-month-long attempt to steal Justice Allison Riggs's seat after her victory in the state supreme court election. Achieved a Democratic trifecta in Virginia , with Abigail Spanberger elected governor with one of the widest win margins in recent Virginia Governor election history. Supported Proposition 50 in California — which was overwhelmingly approved by voters — to counter Trump’s power grab in Texas. Overcame an influx of special-interest spending to retain pro-democracy Justices Christine Donohue, Kevin Dougherty, and David Wecht on Pennsylvania’s highest court. Defeated Elon Musk’s millions in the highly contested Wisconsin Supreme Court race to retain Judge Susan Crawford’s seat. ... and more. As we look ahead to 2026, we are investing in leaders and races that are critical to the long-term fight for a fairer, more representative democracy. And I’m confident that, together, we’ll keep proving that our democracy can not only survive — but be made stronger and more resilient than ever, thanks to people like you. Here’s to the year ahead, John Bisognano President, National Democratic Redistricting Committee | = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NW, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC. body:
In the new year, every dollar we’ve raised will be published in a report for everyone to see — including our opponent, right-wing special interests, and the media.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251220-931&t=1&akid=931%2E294397%2End1pIB)
We’re facing a major public fundraising deadline on December 31st.
In the new year, every dollar we’ve raised will be published in a report for everyone to see — including our opponent, right-wing special interests, and the media.
**That report sends a message:**
It tells the outside world how much grassroots support this campaign has.
It shapes how seriously we’re taken.
_And_ it influences how aggressively outside groups on the other side move against us.
**We want that message to be loud and clear:**
This campaign has real momentum, powered by real people. But we can only do that if supporters step up before our 12/31 deadline.

# [A Name Change That Diminishes Everything It Touches](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=182132463&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyMTMyNDYzLCJpYXQiOjE3NjYyNjExMjYsImV4cCI6MTc2ODg1MzEyNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.sqGizJK_QuPH0d-8RjzO5IsObMxeLArUeqzMrb9DGPo)
### What happens when ego replaces stewardship at America's cultural landmarks
| | [David Shuster](https://substack.com/@davidshuster) and [Blue Amp](https://substack.com/@blueamp)
---
| Dec 20
---
| [](https://substack.com/@davidshuster)| | [](https://substack.com/@blueamp)

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=182132463&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyMTMyNDYzLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2NjI2MTEyNiwiZXhwIjoxNzY4ODUzMTI2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzcyMjUzMiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.pgKfmg4E2DluXjMVGVb5zpEog8NSthcx11MZDI9Xhpc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=182132463&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyMTMyNDYzLCJpYXQiOjE3NjYyNjExMjYsImV4cCI6MTc2ODg1MzEyNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.sqGizJK_QuPH0d-8RjzO5IsObMxeLArUeqzMrb9DGPo&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/blueamp/p/from-bach-to-bluster-the-kennedy?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a81d5f13-8a42-4f31-bc4d-d24d56b342be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a81d5f13-8a42-4f31-bc4d-d24d56b342be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**By David Shuster**_
For all of us who ever lived in Washington, D.C. or visited, one of the safer assumptions in our nation's capitol was that the John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts would always honor a dead President who, whatever his sins, possessed at least a rudimentary respect for civilization. That assumption has now been annihilated.
The Kennedy Center is being rechristened with the name of Donald J. Trump, a man whose chief contribution to art and aesthetics has been the gilding of the Presidency and the mass production of horrifying vulgarity.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a81d5f13-8a42-4f31-bc4d-d24d56b342be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This is not commemoration; it is appropriation and personal aggrandizement. Trump has slapped his name on everything from skyscrapers to steaks. Now, he is vandalizing the cathedral of American performing arts. The Kennedy Center was created to honor President Kennedy's belief that the arts are essential to a vibrant democracy - not to serve as Trump billboard.
Yet here we are.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a81d5f13-8a42-4f31-bc4d-d24d56b342be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Kennedy Center board members who voted to rename the facility the Trump-Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts are a collection of MAGA sycophants, Trump cultists, and right wing nutjobs. The list includes: Sergio Gor (A Trump aide that even Elon Musk labelled a "snake"), Maria Bartiromo (Fox Business News), Laura Ingraham (Fox News Channel) Paolo Zampoli (Melania Trump's modeling agent) Susie Wiles (Trump Chief of Staff) Lee Greenwood (MAGA favored musician/Trump bible co-seller) and other.
This is a lunatic Trump group that has long mistaken obedience for patriotism and vanity for legacy. Their logic is clear: if something exists, is admired, and does not already bear Trump's name, then clearly an injustice has occurred. Correct it at once.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a81d5f13-8a42-4f31-bc4d-d24d56b342be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Kennedy family, understandably, has reacted with something between astonishment and nausea. Maria Shriver, JFK's niece, describes the renaming as "beyond comprehension" and "downright weird." She points out the absurdity of adding Trump's name alongside and in front of her Uncle's, noting that JFK _built the legacy of American support for the arts_. The Center was conceived as a living memorial to John F. Kennedy's belief that the arts mattered, that a nation which could not sing, dance, or think beautifully was a nation already halfway embalmed. Trump's philosophy of culture, by contrast, seems to be that anything that does not flatter him personally is either rigged, woke, or insufficiently large.
* * *
Blue Amp Media is a reader-supported publication - subscribe for free!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.9yQG1XE0nNNKSSVnBhEDDdDLsReSvO7DZd3AjE78fbA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=182132463)
* * *
One large issue the MAGATs are ignoring with this change is federal law. The Kennedy Center was designated by Congress as a living memorial to JFK and named as such via Congressional legislation. The law was passed by the House and Senate in 1964 and signed by President Lyndon Johnson.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a81d5f13-8a42-4f31-bc4d-d24d56b342be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Changing it requires Congressional approval. But not according to team Trump.
The tragedy is not just that Trump is having his name chiseled into yet another edifice. The tragedy is that the edifice in question is supposed to house excellence. The Kennedy Center has long been the home of the National Symphony Orchestra. The NSO is a serious, world class ensemble playing serious music for people who possess ears.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a81d5f13-8a42-4f31-bc4d-d24d56b342be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In the newly Trumpified Center, one imagines the concert hall stage will soon host _The Gold-Plated MAGA Polka Kingsm_ thumping out martial oompah tunes while a fog machine pumps out artificial patriotism and a giant LED screen flashes the words _TREMENDOUS VIBRATO_.
Perhaps there will also be monthly performances of _The MAGA Marching Band & Patriotic Yodelers_, belting out renditions of "Yankee Doodle" with cowbells, or _The Trumpets of Triumph_ playing only national anthems 24/7. Indeed, thanks to Trump and his cultists, the Center will become more of a Disney parade than a symphonic stage. A carnival of crude nationalism will undoubtedly replace the harmonies of Mahler and Copland. Such absurdities might be funny if the real stakes were not so high.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a81d5f13-8a42-4f31-bc4d-d24d56b342be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Because this isn't just about a name on a building. It's about cultural memory, national values, and what we choose to honor.
In announcing the news on X, White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt wrote, "Congratulations to President Donald J. Trump, and likewise, congratulations to President Kennedy, because this will be a truly great team long into the future."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a81d5f13-8a42-4f31-bc4d-d24d56b342be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Really? Kennedy is dead. He is buried in Arlington National Cemetery. Did Karoline Leavitt not know this?
Even if Leavitt is just trolling Kennedy fans and historians, all of this underscores that this renaming represents not reverence for art and history, but contempt. Trump does not elevate institutions. He drags them into the swamp of his own disgusting corruption. Wherever the Trump name lands, seriousness flees, dignity evaporates, and failure arrives.
We should all ask ourselves: Do we want our national cultural institutions governed as boutique branding exercises -- or as spaces that honor history, artistic integrity, and the public good? This renaming is more than distasteful -- it is an insult to artists, audiences, and the very idea of a cultural commons.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a81d5f13-8a42-4f31-bc4d-d24d56b342be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Also, renaming the facility will not enlarge Trump's stature by a single inch. Instead, it will shrink the Center, cheapen its purpose, and confirm what most sentient observers already know: Trump's hunger for self-glorification is so vast he must now feed on the dead, the historic, and the cultured alike.
And what's next? The Trump-Washington monument? The Trump-Lincoln memorial?
Congress and the courts should reverse this non-sense. (Lawsuits, please.) The only place Trump's name belongs is in the dustbin of history, or better yet, attached to a sewage collection plant.
Trump and his crew are vile.
* * *

clean_body: What happens when ego replaces stewardship at America's cultural landmarks | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? What happens when ego replaces stewardship at America's cultural landmarks | | and | Dec 20 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- By David Shuster For all of us who ever lived in Washington, D.C. or visited, one of the safer assumptions in our nation's capitol was that the John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts would always honor a dead President who, whatever his sins, possessed at least a rudimentary respect for civilization. That assumption has now been annihilated. The Kennedy Center is being rechristened with the name of Donald J. Trump, a man whose chief contribution to art and aesthetics has been the gilding of the Presidency and the mass production of horrifying vulgarity. | | ---|---|--- This is not commemoration; it is appropriation and personal aggrandizement. Trump has slapped his name on everything from skyscrapers to steaks. Now, he is vandalizing the cathedral of American performing arts. The Kennedy Center was created to honor President Kennedy's belief that the arts are essential to a vibrant democracy - not to serve as Trump billboard. Yet here we are. | | ---|---|--- The Kennedy Center board members who voted to rename the facility the Trump-Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts are a collection of MAGA sycophants, Trump cultists, and right wing nutjobs. The list includes: Sergio Gor (A Trump aide that even Elon Musk labelled a "snake"), Maria Bartiromo (Fox Business News), Laura Ingraham (Fox News Channel) Paolo Zampoli (Melania Trump's modeling agent) Susie Wiles (Trump Chief of Staff) Lee Greenwood (MAGA favored musician/Trump bible co-seller) and other. This is a lunatic Trump group that has long mistaken obedience for patriotism and vanity for legacy. Their logic is clear: if something exists, is admired, and does not already bear Trump's name, then clearly an injustice has occurred. Correct it at once. | | ---|---|--- The Kennedy family, understandably, has reacted with something between astonishment and nausea. Maria Shriver, JFK's niece, describes the renaming as "beyond comprehension" and "downright weird." She points out the absurdity of adding Trump's name alongside and in front of her Uncle's, noting that JFK built the legacy of American support for the arts. The Center was conceived as a living memorial to John F. Kennedy's belief that the arts mattered, that a nation which could not sing, dance, or think beautifully was a nation already halfway embalmed. Trump's philosophy of culture, by contrast, seems to be that anything that does not flatter him personally is either rigged, woke, or insufficiently large. Blue Amp Media is a reader-supported publication - subscribe for free! One large issue the MAGATs are ignoring with this change is federal law. The Kennedy Center was designated by Congress as a living memorial to JFK and named as such via Congressional legislation. The law was passed by the House and Senate in 1964 and signed by President Lyndon Johnson. | | ---|---|--- Changing it requires Congressional approval. But not according to team Trump. The tragedy is not just that Trump is having his name chiseled into yet another edifice. The tragedy is that the edifice in question is supposed to house excellence. The Kennedy Center has long been the home of the National Symphony Orchestra. The NSO is a serious, world class ensemble playing serious music for people who possess ears. | | ---|---|--- In the newly Trumpified Center, one imagines the concert hall stage will soon host The Gold-Plated MAGA Polka Kingsm thumping out martial oompah tunes while a fog machine pumps out artificial patriotism and a giant LED screen flashes the words TREMENDOUS VIBRATO. Perhaps there will also be monthly performances of The MAGA Marching Band & Patriotic Yodelers, belting out renditions of "Yankee Doodle" with cowbells, or The Trumpets of Triumph playing only national anthems 24/7. Indeed, thanks to Trump and his cultists, the Center will become more of a Disney parade than a symphonic stage. A carnival of crude nationalism will undoubtedly replace the harmonies of Mahler and Copland. Such absurdities might be funny if the real stakes were not so high. | | ---|---|--- Because this isn't just about a name on a building. It's about cultural memory, national values, and what we choose to honor. In announcing the news on X, White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt wrote, "Congratulations to President Donald J. Trump, and likewise, congratulations to President Kennedy, because this will be a truly great team long into the future." | | ---|---|--- Really? Kennedy is dead. He is buried in Arlington National Cemetery. Did Karoline Leavitt not know this? Even if Leavitt is just trolling Kennedy fans and historians, all of this underscores that this renaming represents not reverence for art and history, but contempt. Trump does not elevate institutions. He drags them into the swamp of his own disgusting corruption. Wherever the Trump name lands, seriousness flees, dignity evaporates, and failure arrives. We should all ask ourselves: Do we want our national cultural institutions governed as boutique branding exercises -- or as spaces that honor history, artistic integrity, and the public good? This renaming is more than distasteful -- it is an insult to artists, audiences, and the very idea of a cultural commons. | | ---|---|--- Also, renaming the facility will not enlarge Trump's stature by a single inch. Instead, it will shrink the Center, cheapen its purpose, and confirm what most sentient observers already know: Trump's hunger for self-glorification is so vast he must now feed on the dead, the historic, and the cultured alike. And what's next? The Trump-Washington monument? The Trump-Lincoln memorial? Congress and the courts should reverse this non-sense. (Lawsuits, please.) The only place Trump's name belongs is in the dustbin of history, or better yet, attached to a sewage collection plant. Trump and his crew are vile. Read more from Blue Amp Media! | | , , and 2 others| | ---|---|--- | Dec 16 | | | and | | ---|---|--- | Dec 16 | | | and | | ---|---|--- | Dec 18 | * | | ---|---|--- Invite your friends and earn rewards If you enjoy Blue Amp Media, share it with your friends and earn rewards when they subscribe. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=9cP0T0D4LjLsrlsIwrn2V66BeIEY8AXWiUQ7BnWlXAIXT2%2FZdAYLoOnhc0%2FUfQyN5wVmeiLm2HR2J6afUSXLG66UlSRW%2BzlKe1M8Bsa7mS29LwX0Vsf%2B%2BhgkdUtnn5kaOuC0Vf59XgY6YiwZOuRVRHJcDb%2FCFo4I2W8vz1e08xwNpvPIFpYRINd7UYLEsoepylp5qTrBKb1T0RRqzAcIca62vFv7dzIKRBUXensyUN%2F3h3ryU%2Fm0WeyQqvnpYi1WWVPRFkEv3AAll9Y38fuNfi3Mt%2FMFLSZ%2BesQ039Ok9ymjsWqDoF2RKzYuAcqA5uE82y%2BkLmhywUUkdJ%2FJWQmU1iTzVtKQVfVElSsCh%2FYxhkV08wQXNWrqcBVnlKMvl2lSq14F%2BFDIyMYmuY9X9rfWNhb7h1gQAhVNmvQ0m9FE0YWJITGvuHQEoDT%2Fk2enlYzR]

# [#]
Peter,

As the Holidays arrive, I’ve been thinking a lot about what this time of year brings out in people. Rhode Island may be small, but we have a remarkable way of showing up for each other, not just in emergencies or big moments, but in the simple, everyday ways that make this season feel so meaningful.

Every December, I see volunteers organizing coat drives, teachers putting together holiday gifts for students, and neighbors checking in on seniors who live alone. And during a year when so many families are juggling higher costs and tighter budgets, these quiet acts of generosity matter more than ever.

I hope the next few days give you the chance to slow down, spend time with the people you love, and enjoy moments of rest. I know how busy life can get, and how rare it is to have uninterrupted time with friends and family.

This season has also made me reflect on how grateful I am for everyone who has supported this work. Whether you’ve attended a town hall, written to my office about an issue that matters to you, shared our messages with friends, or contributed to help keep this campaign going, I want you to know it means a great deal to me. The work we do is only possible because people like you choose to be part of it.

Wishing you a peaceful holiday season.

— Seth
PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
PO BOX 40993, PROVIDENCE, RI 02940

Folks,

In a recent interview, Donald Trump told POLITICO that he would rate the economy under his administration as “A+++++.”

The American people beg to differ.

Here’s what Donald Trump’s A+++++ economy really means:

→ Rising prices on groceries, utilities, housing, and health care

→ Fewer toys for your kids and less food to put on the table

→ More tax giveaways for Trump and his billionaire friends

But these remarks are no surprise coming from the same man who called the affordability crisis a “hoax” and pushed his Republican allies in Congress to kick millions of Americans off their health care to pay for tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy.

Jason Crow knows what real servant leadership is. It’s making life better for working people — not bending the knee to Donald Trump. name: Dan Goldman
subject: My bill to make billionaires pay their fair share
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, In the richest country in the world, the dramatic increase in wealth inequality that we’ve seen over the last thirty years is shocking and unacceptable. **A primary reason is because the wealthiest billionaires pay almost**** _nothing_****in taxes.** According to a 2021 ProPublica investigation, the 25 wealthiest people in America pay an average effective tax rate of 3.4%. Elon Musk pays 3% and Jeff Bezos pays 1%. How? Instead of selling their Tesla or Amazon stock and paying capital gains tax, they borrow billions of dollars against their stock — and pay no tax on the loans. A system where working New Yorkers pay their taxes on every paycheck while the wealthiest among us pay almost no taxes is rigged against working families. **That ends now. It’s time for the ultra-wealthy to pay their fair share.** My ROBINHOOD Act would close this loophole by imposing a 20% federal tax on these loans — the same tax as capital gains. It’s estimated that this new tax could generate at least _$276 billion_ over 10 years. That’s enough money to fully fund universal childcare for all kids under 5 or restore the American Rescue Plan’s childcare investments that cut child poverty by more than 40%. [**We have to act now to address the wealth inequality crisis. If you agree, will you sign on now as a supporter of my new ROBINHOOD Act?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121685709/590245106/858078164?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTljNWMzYS1kZWRkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z27lZeLHgpxwjufICDyWqWmRkkOM_Bzv11ABSZylk7w=&emci=a2a90377-94db-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=b19c5c3a-dedd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=13556823) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121685710/590245107/858078164?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTljNWMzYS1kZWRkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z27lZeLHgpxwjufICDyWqWmRkkOM_Bzv11ABSZylk7w=&emci=a2a90377-94db-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=b19c5c3a-dedd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=13556823)

A state built on faith, family, freedom, and the Second Amendment is being tested -- and its future will shape the country.

| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5cc665a3c1cc48fa9dffc137f5a296e9&_e=LVVx1q0ed8Hj_Y2_zLBxZ9mBPbEBdupVOv8w0q7OPRDjCyyqTJ4DTSFyv5t27kba3ltB5YY4rUA2UaSQO3Jw8Mcduy3ABc7uUhzBBbSxpOTUugOCI-YVkeijXpA2fLkqR2JJTvc31Cu-REAJd5HkC0U3altkEfC7yI87BRDpcJjcBKkS5YJL28FFNghZ4xvYIoOy6nQoEIdryKTWa056v81naFOAQ5udCgi0n9Cj2IYpCqcY-uHcUBPY-UYqgg46FU6tZ9vloDymTxsKbW7rTV9LM7OuR7xqTD-_n3eVDdduVu0KKNXqJ6bP6hmNxZcyoaZR0A9r-bx64eBvtUiwb7aDI4yfoS-uEl0CJHZewT6kEmgioyViazw7IgEJ4hSHxF-VYplfE969pjxKCz6hqDIrQSqsDyRpUDK9eFsX7HrLJpX7AZZHc3CsgP28pwFqNBNZE67cFd8hteEJIj3nb6Kj3wKVkL0uqbhfeRLf3LQt38c8ve8t57eQo8PZ6DTIcmDE8m4R3PAZDeqsGWhC8MClFyagIjOUsL2mHkToQGtULzSgtN6eIvrBE6SRM4msloxQPPJQ0gb5pp379wi6OUNs2BjbQAFPzbHHq3O7Irc%3D)

| | Peter,
---
| | If this is the first time you're hearing from me, let me introduce myself. My name is **Victor Marx** -- a husband, father, Marine Corps veteran, former pastor, and founder of an international humanitarian organization that has carried out more than 150 high-risk rescue missions around the world.I've spent my life stepping into the chaos most people run from, fighting for those who can't fight for themselves.
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5cc665a3c1cc48fa9dffc137f5a296e9&_e=LVVx1q0ed8Hj_Y2_zLBxZ9mBPbEBdupVOv8w0q7OPRDjCyyqTJ4DTSFyv5t27kba3ltB5YY4rUA2UaSQO3Jw8Mcduy3ABc7uUhzBBbSxpOTUugOCI-YVkeijXpA2fLkqR2JJTvc31Cu-REAJd5HkC0U3altkEfC7yI87BRDpcJjcBKkS5YJL28FFNghZ4xvYIoOy6nQoEIdryKTWa056v-o6V7S9GDYNgDMOvikrr_1WFVbgu8Sh5wXPxXSp2IxgXrf7X0imrF31NpUp-KqdTFusMpHiwwZzXL1ICuKxvoO59_UShTv4n9iRbZ-HyOaQy1b-HYERVzKe8isVJId93eFLnRACiy-cj41w6cIykZ-OfabvXScW5kt6wvK-IVzUbVgGyB61w-oHHqf-wkFChkMeHA8Ni3tfSiZq1MhjQO3aUCovW9cyhRnDF6KfZk1FJqvLR-OhY2sgtk8_TtNXAduy7EUwfeem1nQL7oGg370qcesPLD6c_a4mhHZy8LapfTDl5Uatfer_CVromNha7VuO-OwQBmyFtni11YnlqiYePlRagCG6fQA8nH-oRWshlEKeCMlZletNpLPO6iBRbTROUUcn2YBwDDtAoILJORI%3D)

**_I never expected to run for Governor of Colorado..._** But people I respected deeply -- _including Charlie and Erika Kirk_ -- believed in me and urged me to step forward because they saw what was happening here in our state.After Charlie was killed, Erika reminded me that he believed this was a fight I was meant to take on.**They were right, and I am now fully committed to winning this fight.**[_**Today, I am asking you to join me...**_](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5cc665a3c1cc48fa9dffc137f5a296e9&_e=LVVx1q0ed8Hj_Y2_zLBxZ9mBPbEBdupVOv8w0q7OPRDjCyyqTJ4DTSFyv5t27kba3ltB5YY4rUA2UaSQO3Jw8Mcduy3ABc7uUhzBBbSxpOTUugOCI-YVkeijXpA2fLkqR2JJTvc31Cu-REAJd5HkC0U3altkEfC7yI87BRDpcJjcBKkS5YJL28FFNghZ4xvYIoOy6nQoEIdryKTWa056v2JpUs4b-ch-4tNLQz_DSY2n2e6PjLCJ9YlNPWyxGfAHrwIW2x95m8hOF73Ct3qaUPHCu8Fu7LQDuRbBe_wOVO1Ll_Bl7i5Obcb_yXwK9XOfu1ZZi3O_D8_YpJVmmYjLbIu8JltpA3szaMh8OihYEKpOeIHE13Rypjv9rDe2wJxnUe0uau0sNCo9dYSrMQ31cfXub56ewDabmTUPGuiO3ZL0jRHvKjEayElbfbn7SpgKRwk79Q0276inm5tqgzHIL770hoE6WAslg68kw2Kl-nYjriD5VAnCfi09613mwBZXn1obpnKBvRiJ3Vvr6ONmBbS4He3TBc4q1OqKV7o_WTH-LN59xRnu6xz6K-8BKX-t5D0jtv07f4-7434ONSNeOwp0NP_CybAL45bTUWzhBCU%3D)
